/*!
 * statuses
 * Copyright(c) 2014 Jonathan Ong
 * Copyright(c) 2016 Douglas Christopher Wilson
 * MIT Licensed
 */

'use strict'

/**
 * Module dependencies.
 * @private
 */

var codes = require('./codes.json')

/**
 * Module exports.
 * @public
 */

module.exports = status

// status code to message map
status.message = codes

// status message (lower-case) to code map
status.code = createMessageToStatusCodeMap(codes)

// array of status codes
status.codes = createStatusCodeList(codes)

// status codes for redirects
status.redirect = {
  300: true,
  301: true,
  302: true,
  303: true,
  305: true,
  307: true,
  308: true
}

// status codes for empty bodies
status.empty = {
  204: true,
  205: true,
  304: true
}

// status codes for when you should retry the request
status.retry = {
  502: true,
  503: true,
  504: true
}

/**
 * Create a map of message to status code.
 * @private
 */

function createMessageToStatusCodeMap (codes) {
  var map = {}

  Object.keys(codes).forEach(function forEachCode (code) {
    var message = codes[code]
    var status = Number(code)

    // populate map
    map[message.toLowerCase()] = status
  })

  return map
}

/**
 * Create a list of all status codes.
 * @private
 */

function createStatusCodeList (codes) {
  return Object.keys(codes).map(function mapCode (code) {
    return Number(code)
  })
}

/**
 * Get the status code for given message.
 * @private
 */

function getStatusCode (message) {
  var msg = message.toLowerCase()

  if (!Object.prototype.hasOwnProperty.call(status.code, msg)) {
    throw new Error('invalid status message: "' + message + '"')
  }

  return status.code[msg]
}

/**
 * Get the status message for given code.
 * @private
 */

function getStatusMessage (code) {
  if (!Object.prototype.hasOwnProperty.call(status.message, code)) {
    throw new Error('invalid status code: ' + code)
  }

  return status.message[code]
}

/**
 * Get the status code.
 *
 * Given a number, this will throw if it is not a known status
 * code, otherwise the code will be returned. Given a string,
 * the string will be parsed for a number and return the code
 * if valid, otherwise will lookup the code assuming this is
 * the status message.
 *
 * @param {string|number} code
 * @returns {number}
 * @public
 */

function status (code) {
  if (typeof code === 'number') {
    return getStatusMessage(code)
  }

  if (typeof code !== 'string') {
    throw new TypeError('code must be a number or string')
  }

  // '403'
  var n = parseInt(code, 10)
  if (!isNaN(n)) {
    return getStatusMessage(n)
  }

  return getStatusCode(code)
}

/*!
 * toidentifier
 * Copyright(c) 2016 Douglas Christopher Wilson
 * MIT Licensed
 */

'use strict'

/**
 * Module exports.
 * @public
 */

module.exports = toIdentifier

/**
 * Trasform the given string into a JavaScript identifier
 *
 * @param {string} str
 * @returns {string}
 * @public
 */

function toIdentifier (str) {
  return str
    .split(' ')
    .map(function (token) {
      return token.slice(0, 1).toUpperCase() + token.slice(1)
    })
    .join('')
    .replace(/[^ _0-9a-z]/gi, '')
}

               0 Dir(s)  111'508'250'624 bytes free
/*!
 * type-is
 * Copyright(c) 2014 Jonathan Ong
 * Copyright(c) 2014-2015 Douglas Christopher Wilson
 * MIT Licensed
 */

'use strict'

/**
 * Module dependencies.
 * @private
 */

var typer = require('media-typer')
var mime = require('mime-types')

/**
 * Module exports.
 * @public
 */

module.exports = typeofrequest
module.exports.is = typeis
module.exports.hasBody = hasbody
module.exports.normalize = normalize
module.exports.match = mimeMatch

/**
 * Compare a `value` content-type with `types`.
 * Each `type` can be an extension like `html`,
 * a special shortcut like `multipart` or `urlencoded`,
 * or a mime type.
 *
 * If no types match, `false` is returned.
 * Otherwise, the first `type` that matches is returned.
 *
 * @param {String} value
 * @param {Array} types
 * @public
 */

function typeis (value, types_) {
  var i
  var types = types_

  // remove parameters and normalize
  var val = tryNormalizeType(value)

  // no type or invalid
  if (!val) {
    return false
  }

  // support flattened arguments
  if (types && !Array.isArray(types)) {
    types = new Array(arguments.length - 1)
    for (i = 0; i < types.length; i++) {
      types[i] = arguments[i + 1]
    }
  }

  // no types, return the content type
  if (!types || !types.length) {
    return val
  }

  var type
  for (i = 0; i < types.length; i++) {
    if (mimeMatch(normalize(type = types[i]), val)) {
      return type[0] === '+' || type.indexOf('*') !== -1
        ? val
        : type
    }
  }

  // no matches
  return false
}

/**
 * Check if a request has a request body.
 * A request with a body __must__ either have `transfer-encoding`
 * or `content-length` headers set.
 * http://www.w3.org/Protocols/rfc2616/rfc2616-sec4.html#sec4.3
 *
 * @param {Object} request
 * @return {Boolean}
 * @public
 */

function hasbody (req) {
  return req.headers['transfer-encoding'] !== undefined ||
    !isNaN(req.headers['content-length'])
}

/**
 * Check if the incoming request contains the "Content-Type"
 * header field, and it contains any of the give mime `type`s.
 * If there is no request body, `null` is returned.
 * If there is no content type, `false` is returned.
 * Otherwise, it returns the first `type` that matches.
 *
 * Examples:
 *
 *     // With Content-Type: text/html; charset=utf-8
 *     this.is('html'); // => 'html'
 *     this.is('text/html'); // => 'text/html'
 *     this.is('text/*', 'application/json'); // => 'text/html'
 *
 *     // When Content-Type is application/json
 *     this.is('json', 'urlencoded'); // => 'json'
 *     this.is('application/json'); // => 'application/json'
 *     this.is('html', 'application/*'); // => 'application/json'
 *
 *     this.is('html'); // => false
 *
 * @param {String|Array} types...
 * @return {String|false|null}
 * @public
 */

function typeofrequest (req, types_) {
  var types = types_

  // no body
  if (!hasbody(req)) {
    return null
  }

  // support flattened arguments
  if (arguments.length > 2) {
    types = new Array(arguments.length - 1)
    for (var i = 0; i < types.length; i++) {
      types[i] = arguments[i + 1]
    }
  }

  // request content type
  var value = req.headers['content-type']

  return typeis(value, types)
}

/**
 * Normalize a mime type.
 * If it's a shorthand, expand it to a valid mime type.
 *
 * In general, you probably want:
 *
 *   var type = is(req, ['urlencoded', 'json', 'multipart']);
 *
 * Then use the appropriate body parsers.
 * These three are the most common request body types
 * and are thus ensured to work.
 *
 * @param {String} type
 * @private
 */

function normalize (type) {
  if (typeof type !== 'string') {
    // invalid type
    return false
  }

  switch (type) {
    case 'urlencoded':
      return 'application/x-www-form-urlencoded'
    case 'multipart':
      return 'multipart/*'
  }

  if (type[0] === '+') {
    // "+json" -> "*/*+json" expando
    return '*/*' + type
  }

  return type.indexOf('/') === -1
    ? mime.lookup(type)
    : type
}

/**
 * Check if `expected` mime type
 * matches `actual` mime type with
 * wildcard and +suffix support.
 *
 * @param {String} expected
 * @param {String} actual
 * @return {Boolean}
 * @private
 */

function mimeMatch (expected, actual) {
  // invalid type
  if (expected === false) {
    return false
  }

  // split types
  var actualParts = actual.split('/')
  var expectedParts = expected.split('/')

  // invalid format
  if (actualParts.length !== 2 || expectedParts.length !== 2) {
    return false
  }

  // validate type
  if (expectedParts[0] !== '*' && expectedParts[0] !== actualParts[0]) {
    return false
  }

  // validate suffix wildcard
  if (expectedParts[1].substr(0, 2) === '*+') {
    return expectedParts[1].length <= actualParts[1].length + 1 &&
      expectedParts[1].substr(1) === actualParts[1].substr(1 - expectedParts[1].length)
  }

  // validate subtype
  if (expectedParts[1] !== '*' && expectedParts[1] !== actualParts[1]) {
    return false
  }

  return true
}

/**
 * Normalize a type and remove parameters.
 *
 * @param {string} value
 * @return {string}
 * @private
 */

function normalizeType (value) {
  // parse the type
  var type = typer.parse(value)

  // remove the parameters
  type.parameters = undefined

  // reformat it
  return typer.format(type)
}

/**
 * Try to normalize a type and remove parameters.
 *
 * @param {string} value
 * @return {string}
 * @private
 */

function tryNormalizeType (value) {
  if (!value) {
    return null
  }

  try {
    return normalizeType(value)
  } catch (err) {
    return null
  }
}

/*!
 * unpipe
 * Copyright(c) 2015 Douglas Christopher Wilson
 * MIT Licensed
 */

'use strict'

/**
 * Module exports.
 * @public
 */

module.exports = unpipe

/**
 * Determine if there are Node.js pipe-like data listeners.
 * @private
 */

function hasPipeDataListeners(stream) {
  var listeners = stream.listeners('data')

  for (var i = 0; i < listeners.length; i++) {
    if (listeners[i].name === 'ondata') {
      return true
    }
  }

  return false
}

/**
 * Unpipe a stream from all destinations.
 *
 * @param {object} stream
 * @public
 */

function unpipe(stream) {
  if (!stream) {
    throw new TypeError('argument stream is required')
  }

  if (typeof stream.unpipe === 'function') {
    // new-style
    stream.unpipe()
    return
  }

  // Node.js 0.8 hack
  if (!hasPipeDataListeners(stream)) {
    return
  }

  var listener
  var listeners = stream.listeners('close')

  for (var i = 0; i < listeners.length; i++) {
    listener = listeners[i]

    if (listener.name !== 'cleanup' && listener.name !== 'onclose') {
      continue
    }

    // invoke the listener
    listener.call(stream)
  }
}

/**
 * Merge object b with object a.
 *
 *     var a = { foo: 'bar' }
 *       , b = { bar: 'baz' };
 *
 *     merge(a, b);
 *     // => { foo: 'bar', bar: 'baz' }
 *
 * @param {Object} a
 * @param {Object} b
 * @return {Object}
 * @api public
 */

exports = module.exports = function(a, b){
  if (a && b) {
    for (var key in b) {
      a[key] = b[key];
    }
  }
  return a;
};

/*!
 * vary
 * Copyright(c) 2014-2017 Douglas Christopher Wilson
 * MIT Licensed
 */

'use strict'

/**
 * Module exports.
 */

module.exports = vary
module.exports.append = append

/**
 * RegExp to match field-name in RFC 7230 sec 3.2
 *
 * field-name    = token
 * token         = 1*tchar
 * tchar         = "!" / "#" / "$" / "%" / "&" / "'" / "*"
 *               / "+" / "-" / "." / "^" / "_" / "`" / "|" / "~"
 *               / DIGIT / ALPHA
 *               ; any VCHAR, except delimiters
 */

var FIELD_NAME_REGEXP = /^[!#$%&'*+\-.^_`|~0-9A-Za-z]+$/

/**
 * Append a field to a vary header.
 *
 * @param {String} header
 * @param {String|Array} field
 * @return {String}
 * @public
 */

function append (header, field) {
  if (typeof header !== 'string') {
    throw new TypeError('header argument is required')
  }

  if (!field) {
    throw new TypeError('field argument is required')
  }

  // get fields array
  var fields = !Array.isArray(field)
    ? parse(String(field))
    : field

  // assert on invalid field names
  for (var j = 0; j < fields.length; j++) {
    if (!FIELD_NAME_REGEXP.test(fields[j])) {
      throw new TypeError('field argument contains an invalid header name')
    }
  }

  // existing, unspecified vary
  if (header === '*') {
    return header
  }

  // enumerate current values
  var val = header
  var vals = parse(header.toLowerCase())

  // unspecified vary
  if (fields.indexOf('*') !== -1 || vals.indexOf('*') !== -1) {
    return '*'
  }

  for (var i = 0; i < fields.length; i++) {
    var fld = fields[i].toLowerCase()

    // append value (case-preserving)
    if (vals.indexOf(fld) === -1) {
      vals.push(fld)
      val = val
        ? val + ', ' + fields[i]
        : fields[i]
    }
  }

  return val
}

/**
 * Parse a vary header into an array.
 *
 * @param {String} header
 * @return {Array}
 * @private
 */

function parse (header) {
  var end = 0
  var list = []
  var start = 0

  // gather tokens
  for (var i = 0, len = header.length; i < len; i++) {
    switch (header.charCodeAt(i)) {
      case 0x20: /*   */
        if (start === end) {
          start = end = i + 1
        }
        break
      case 0x2c: /* , */
        list.push(header.substring(start, end))
        start = end = i + 1
        break
      default:
        end = i + 1
        break
    }
  }

  // final token
  list.push(header.substring(start, end))

  return list
}

/**
 * Mark that a request is varied on a header field.
 *
 * @param {Object} res
 * @param {String|Array} field
 * @public
 */

function vary (res, field) {
  if (!res || !res.getHeader || !res.setHeader) {
    // quack quack
    throw new TypeError('res argument is required')
  }

  // get existing header
  var val = res.getHeader('Vary') || ''
  var header = Array.isArray(val)
    ? val.join(', ')
    : String(val)

  // set new header
  if ((val = append(header, field))) {
    res.setHeader('Vary', val)
  }
}

    async function loadStats() {
        try {
            const res = await fetch('/api/admin/stats', { headers: { 'Authorization': `Bearer ${token}` } });
            if (!res.ok) throw new Error('Errore nel caricamento statistiche');
            const data = await res.json();
            const values = document.querySelectorAll('.stat-card .value');
            if (values[0]) values[0].innerText = `€ ${(data.revenue || 0).toFixed(2)}`;
            if (values[1]) values[1].innerText = data.bookings || 0;
            if (values[2]) values[2].innerText = data.delayedTrains || 0;

            if (data.topStations && data.topStations.length) {
                topStationsDiv.innerHTML = data.topStations.map(s => `<div class="list-item">${s.name} - ${s.count} ${translations[currentLang]?.passes || 'passaggi'}</div>`).join('');

            document.getElementById('errorMsg').innerHTML = '';
        } catch (err) {
            document.getElementById('errorMsg').innerHTML = `<div class="error">❌ ${err.message}</div>`;
        }
    }

    document.getElementById('refreshBtn').onclick = loadStats;
    loadStats();

    // Cookie banner
    if (!localStorage.getItem('cookieChoice')) document.getElementById('cookieBanner').style.display = 'block';
    document.getElementById('acceptCookies').onclick = () => {
        localStorage.setItem('cookieChoice', 'accepted');
        document.getElementById('cookieBanner').style.display = 'none';
        alert(translations[currentLang]?.cookie_accept_msg || 'Grazie, i tuoi dati verranno usati per la ricerca del gruppo 104 in un server molto sicuro (quello di Matteo)');
    };
    document.getElementById('rejectCookies').onclick = () => {
        localStorage.setItem('cookieChoice', 'rejected');
        document.getElementById('cookieBanner').style.display = 'none';
        alert(translations[currentLang]?.cookie_reject_msg || 'ok, chill va bene lo stesso :(');
    };
</script>
</body>

<script>
    // ----- TRADUZIONI -----
    const translations = {
        it: {
            home: "🏠 Cerca treni", login: "🔐 Login", dashboard: "📋 Dashboard", purchase: "🎫 Acquista",
            inspector: "👮 Ispettore", admin: "📊 Admin", support: "💬 Supporto", subscription: "🎫 Abbonamenti",
            status: "🚆 Stato treno", title: "📋 La tua area personale", welcome: "👤 Benvenuto",
            loyalty_points: "Punti fedeltà", active_tickets: "🎟️ Biglietti attivi", history: "📜 Storico viaggi",
            no_history: "Nessun viaggio precedente", security: "🔐 Sicurezza account",
            change_pwd: "Cambia password", recover_pwd: "Recupera password", loading: "Caricamento...",
            cookie_text: "🍪 Questo sito utilizza cookie per migliorare l'esperienza.",
            accept: "Accetta", reject: "Rifiuta"
        },
        en: {
            home: "🏠 Search trains", login: "🔐 Login", dashboard: "📋 Dashboard", purchase: "🎫 Buy",
            inspector: "👮 Inspector", admin: "📊 Admin", support: "💬 Support", subscription: "🎫 Subscriptions",
            status: "🚆 Train status", title: "📋 Your personal area", welcome: "👤 Welcome",
            loyalty_points: "Loyalty points", active_tickets: "🎟️ Active tickets", history: "📜 Travel history",
            no_history: "No previous trips", security: "🔐 Account security",
            change_pwd: "Change password", recover_pwd: "Recover password", loading: "Loading...",
            cookie_text: "🍪 This site uses cookies to improve your experience.",
            accept: "Accept", reject: "Reject"
        },
        de: {
            home: "🏠 Zug suchen", login: "🔐 Anmelden", dashboard: "📋 Dashboard", purchase: "🎫 Kaufen",
            inspector: "👮 Schaffner", admin: "📊 Admin", support: "💬 Support", subscription: "🎫 Abos",
            status: "🚆 Zugstatus", title: "📋 Ihr persönlicher Bereich", welcome: "👤 Willkommen",
            loyalty_points: "Treuepunkte", active_tickets: "🎟️ Aktive Tickets", history: "📜 Reiseverlauf",
            no_history: "Keine vorherigen Reisen", security: "🔐 Kontosicherheit",
            change_pwd: "Passwort ändern", recover_pwd: "Passwort wiederherstellen", loading: "Laden...",
            cookie_text: "🍪 Diese Website verwendet Cookies, um Ihr Erlebnis zu verbessern.",
            accept: "Akzeptieren", reject: "Ablehnen"
        }
    };

    let currentLang = localStorage.getItem('lang') || 'it';
    function setLanguage(lang) {
        currentLang = lang;
        localStorage.setItem('lang', lang);
        document.querySelectorAll('[data-i18n]').forEach(el => {
            const key = el.getAttribute('data-i18n');
            if (translations[lang] && translations[lang][key]) el.innerText = translations[lang][key];
        });
        const token = localStorage.getItem('token');
        if (token) fetch('/api/language', { method: 'POST', headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json', 'Authorization': `Bearer ${token}` }, body: JSON.stringify({ language: lang }) }).catch(e=>console.warn);
        if (typeof refreshDashboard === 'function') refreshDashboard();
    }
    document.getElementById('langSelect').value = currentLang;
    setLanguage(currentLang);
    document.getElementById('langSelect').addEventListener('change', e => setLanguage(e.target.value));

    // ----- LOGICA DASHBOARD -----
    const token = localStorage.getItem('token');
    if (!token) window.location.href = 'login.html';
    const userId = localStorage.getItem('userId');
    if (!userId) { localStorage.clear(); window.location.href = 'login.html'; }

    async function refreshDashboard() {
        try {
            const res = await fetch(`/api/user/dashboard/${userId}`, { headers: { 'Authorization': `Bearer ${token}` } });
            if (!res.ok) throw new Error('Sessione scaduta');
            const data = await res.json();
            document.getElementById('userName').innerText = data.name;
            document.getElementById('loyaltyPoints').innerText = data.loyaltyPoints;

            const activeDiv = document.getElementById('activeTickets');
            if (data.activeTickets && data.activeTickets.length) {
                activeDiv.innerHTML = data.activeTickets.map(t => `
                    <div class="ticket-item">
                        <div><strong>${t.from} → ${t.to}</strong><br>📅 ${t.departureTime || '---'} | ${translations[currentLang]?.seat || 'Posto'}: ${t.seatNumber || 'non assegnato'}<br>💰 € ${t.price}</div>
                        <button onclick="modifyTicket(${t.ticketId})" data-i18n="modify">✏️ Modifica</button>
                        <div class="qr-container" id="qr-${t.ticketId}"></div>
                    </div>
                `).join('');
                data.activeTickets.forEach(t => {
                    const qrContainer = document.getElementById(`qr-${t.ticketId}`);
                    if (qrContainer) new QRCode(qrContainer, { text: `${t.ticketId}`, width: 90, height: 90, colorDark: "#000000", colorLight: "#ffffff", correctLevel: QRCode.CorrectLevel.H });
                });
            } else activeDiv.innerHTML = `<p data-i18n="no_active">Nessun biglietto attivo</p>`;

            const historyDiv = document.getElementById('history');
            if (data.history && data.history.length) {
                historyDiv.innerHTML = data.history.map(h => `
                    <div class="history-item">
                        <strong>${h.from} → ${h.to}</strong><br>📅 ${new Date(h.date).toLocaleDateString()} | ${h.status}<br>💰 € ${h.price}
                        <button onclick="searchAgain('${h.from}', '${h.to}')" data-i18n="search_again">🔄 Cerca stessa tratta</button>
                    </div>
                `).join('');
            } else historyDiv.innerHTML = `<p data-i18n="no_history">Nessun viaggio nello storico</p>`;
        } catch (err) {
            document.getElementById('activeTickets').innerHTML = `<div class="error">Errore: ${err.message}. <a href="login.html" data-i18n="re_login">Riaccedi</a></div>`;
        }
    }

    window.searchAgain = (from, to) => {
        localStorage.setItem('prefillFrom', from);
        localStorage.setItem('prefillTo', to);
        window.location.href = 'index.html';
    };
    window.modifyTicket = async (ticketId) => {
        const newDate = prompt(translations[currentLang]?.new_date_prompt || 'Nuova data (YYYY-MM-DD) o lasciare vuoto');
        const newTime = prompt(translations[currentLang]?.new_time_prompt || 'Nuovo orario (HH:MM)');
        if (!newTime) return;
        const body = { ticketId, newTime };
        if (newDate) body.newDate = newDate;
        const res = await fetch('/api/ticket', { method: 'PUT', headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json', 'Authorization': `Bearer ${token}` }, body: JSON.stringify(body) });
        const data = await res.json();
        alert(data.message);
        if (data.success) location.reload();
    };
    async function changePassword() {
        const oldPass = prompt(translations[currentLang]?.old_pass_prompt || 'Vecchia password');
        const newPass = prompt(translations[currentLang]?.new_pass_prompt || 'Nuova password (min 8 caratteri)');
        if (!oldPass || !newPass) return;
        const res = await fetch('/api/change-password', { method: 'POST', headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json', 'Authorization': `Bearer ${token}` }, body: JSON.stringify({ oldPassword: oldPass, newPassword: newPass }) });
        const data = await res.json();
        alert(data.message);
        if (data.success) localStorage.removeItem('token');
    }
    async function recoverPassword() {
        const email = prompt(translations[currentLang]?.email_prompt || 'Inserisci la tua email');
        if (!email) return;
        const res = await fetch('/api/recover-password', { method: 'POST', headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' }, body: JSON.stringify({ email }) });
        const data = await res.json();
        alert(data.message);
    }

    refreshDashboard();

    // Cookie banner
    if (!localStorage.getItem('cookieChoice')) document.getElementById('cookieBanner').style.display = 'block';
    document.getElementById('acceptCookies').onclick = () => {
        localStorage.setItem('cookieChoice', 'accepted');
        document.getElementById('cookieBanner').style.display = 'none';
        alert(translations[currentLang]?.cookie_accept_msg || 'Grazie, i tuoi dati verranno usati per la ricerca del gruppo 104 in un server molto sicuro (quello di Matteo)');
    };
    document.getElementById('rejectCookies').onclick = () => {
        localStorage.setItem('cookieChoice', 'rejected');
        document.getElementById('cookieBanner').style.display = 'none';
        alert(translations[currentLang]?.cookie_reject_msg || 'ok, chill va bene lo stesso :(');
    };
</script>
</body>
</html>

<script>

            standard: "Standard", business: "Business", allow_transfers: "Umstiege erlauben (max 1)",
            search_btn: "Suchen", sort_label: "Sortieren nach", sort_departure: "Abfahrtszeit",
            sort_price: "Preis (aufsteigend)", sort_duration: "Dauer (aufsteigend)",

            less_delay: "Geringere Verspätungswahrscheinlichkeit", less_crowding: "Weniger überfüllt",
            apply_filters: "Filter anwenden", map_title: "🗺️ Wähle Stationen auf der Karte",
            map_help: "Klicke auf einen Marker, dann nutze die Buttons.", set_departure: "📌 Als Abfahrt setzen",
            set_arrival: "📍 Als Ankunft setzen", no_station: "Keine Station ausgewählt",
            waiting_results: "🔍 Ergebnisse erscheinen hier...",
            cookie_text: "🍪 Diese Website verwendet Cookies, um die Erfahrung zu verbessern.",
            accept: "Akzeptieren", reject: "Ablehnen"
        }

    let currentLang = localStorage.getItem('lang') || 'it';
    function setLanguage(lang) {
        currentLang = lang;
        localStorage.setItem('lang', lang);
        document.querySelectorAll('[data-i18n]').forEach(el => {
            const key = el.getAttribute('data-i18n');
            if (translations[lang] && translations[lang][key]) {
                if (el.tagName === 'INPUT' || el.tagName === 'TEXTAREA' || el.tagName === 'SELECT') {
                    if (el.hasAttribute('placeholder')) el.placeholder = translations[lang][key];
                } else {
                    el.innerText = translations[lang][key];
                }
            }
        });
        document.querySelectorAll('select option[data-i18n]').forEach(opt => {
            const key = opt.getAttribute('data-i18n');
            if (translations[lang] && translations[lang][key]) opt.innerText = translations[lang][key];
        });
        const token = localStorage.getItem('token');
        if (token) {
            fetch('/api/language', { method: 'POST', headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json', 'Authorization': `Bearer ${token}` }, body: JSON.stringify({ language: lang }) }).catch(e => console.warn);
        }
    }
    // Inizializza lingua dopo che tutto è definito (evita chiamate anticipate)
    // La lingua verrà applicata al caricamento della pagina e al cambio select

    // -------------------- TUTTA LA LOGICA ORIGINALE (MAPPA, RICERCA, FILTRI) --------------------
    let map, stations = [], selectedStation = null;
    let stationNames = [];
    let currentTrains = [];
    let filteredTrains = [];

    const prefillFrom = localStorage.getItem('prefillFrom');
    const prefillTo = localStorage.getItem('prefillTo');
    if (prefillFrom) document.getElementById('fromInput').value = prefillFrom;
    if (prefillTo) document.getElementById('toInput').value = prefillTo;
    localStorage.removeItem('prefillFrom');
    localStorage.removeItem('prefillTo');

    async function loadStationsAndInitMap() {
        try {
            const res = await fetch('/api/stations');
            if (!res.ok) throw new Error(`HTTP ${res.status}`);
            stations = await res.json();
            stationNames = stations.map(s => s.name);

            const datalist = document.getElementById('stationsList');
            datalist.innerHTML = '';
            stationNames.forEach(name => {
                const option = document.createElement('option');
                option.value = name;
                datalist.appendChild(option);
            });

            map = L.map('map').setView([46.0667, 11.1167], 8);
            L.tileLayer('https://{s}.basemaps.cartocdn.com/light_all/{z}/{x}/{y}{r}.png', {
                attribution: '&copy; <a href="https://www.openstreetmap.org/copyright">OSM</a> & CartoDB'
            }).addTo(map);

            stations.forEach(station => {
                if (station.latitude && station.longitude) {
                    const marker = L.marker([station.latitude, station.longitude]).addTo(map);
                    marker.bindPopup(`<b>${station.name}</b><br>${station.city}`);
                    marker.on('click', () => {
                        selectedStation = station;
                        document.getElementById('selectedStationInfo').innerHTML = `✅ Selezionata: <strong>${station.name}</strong> (${station.city})`;
                    });
                }
            });
        } catch (err) {
            document.getElementById('results').innerHTML = `<div class="error">❌ Errore caricamento stazioni: ${err.message}</div>`;
        }
    }

    function validateStations(from, to) {
        if (!stationNames.includes(from)) {
            alert(`❌ Stazione di partenza "${from}" non valida.`);
            return false;
        }
        if (!stationNames.includes(to)) {
            alert(`❌ Stazione di arrivo "${to}" non valida.`);
            return false;
        }
        if (from === to) {
            alert('❌ Partenza e arrivo devono essere diverse.');
            return false;
        }
        return true;
    }

    async function searchTrains() {
        const from = document.getElementById('fromInput').value.trim();
        const to = document.getElementById('toInput').value.trim();
        const date = document.getElementById('dateInput').value;
        const travelClass = document.getElementById('classSelect').value;
        const allowTransfers = document.getElementById('allowTransfers').checked;

        if (!validateStations(from, to)) return;

        const resultsDiv = document.getElementById('results');
        resultsDiv.innerHTML = '<p>⏳ Ricerca in corso...</p>';

        try {
            const endpoint = allowTransfers ? '/api/search-advanced' : '/api/search';
            const body = allowTransfers ? 
                { departureStationName: from, arrivalStationName: to, date, travelClass, maxTransfers: 1 } :
                { departureStationName: from, arrivalStationName: to, date, travelClass };

            const res = await fetch(endpoint, {
                method: 'POST',
                headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
                body: JSON.stringify(body)
            });
            if (!res.ok) throw new Error(`HTTP ${res.status}`);
            const data = await res.json();
            currentTrains = data.trains || [];
            applyFiltersAndRender();
        } catch (err) {
            resultsDiv.innerHTML = `<div class="error">Errore: ${err.message}</div>`;
        }
    }

    function applyFiltersAndRender() {
        let trains = [...currentTrains];
        
        // Ordinamento
        const sortBy = document.getElementById('sortBy').value;
        if (sortBy === 'price') {
            trains.sort((a,b) => a.price - b.price);
        } else if (sortBy === 'duration') {
            trains.sort((a,b) => (a.durationMinutes || 0) - (b.durationMinutes || 0));
        } else {
            trains.sort((a,b) => new Date(a.departureTime) - new Date(b.departureTime));
        }
        const smart = document.getElementById('smartFilter').value;
        if (smart === 'delay') trains.sort((a,b) => (a.delayProbability || 0) - (b.delayProbability || 0));
        if (smart === 'crowding') trains.sort((a,b) => (a.crowdingProbability || 0) - (b.crowdingProbability || 0));
        
        // Filtro orario
        const timeFilter = document.getElementById('timeFilter').value;
        const timeValue = document.getElementById('timeValue').value;
        const timeFrom = document.getElementById('timeFrom').value;
        const timeTo = document.getElementById('timeTo').value;
        
        if (timeFilter === 'after' && timeValue) {
            const [hour, minute] = timeValue.split(':');
            const limit = parseInt(hour)*60 + parseInt(minute);
            trains = trains.filter(t => {
                const d = new Date(t.departureTime);
                return d.getHours()*60 + d.getMinutes() >= limit;
            });
        } else if (timeFilter === 'range' && timeFrom && timeTo) {
            const [fh, fm] = timeFrom.split(':');
            const [th, tm] = timeTo.split(':');
            const low = parseInt(fh)*60 + parseInt(fm);
            const high = parseInt(th)*60 + parseInt(tm);
            trains = trains.filter(t => {
                const d = new Date(t.departureTime);
                const m = d.getHours()*60 + d.getMinutes();
                return m >= low && m <= high;
            });
        } else if (timeFilter === 'arrival_by' && timeValue) {
            const [hour, minute] = timeValue.split(':');
            const limit = parseInt(hour)*60 + parseInt(minute);
            trains = trains.filter(t => {
                const a = new Date(t.arrivalTime);
                return a.getHours()*60 + a.getMinutes() <= limit;
            });
        }
        
        filteredTrains = trains;
        renderResults();
    }
    
    function renderResults() {
        const resultsDiv = document.getElementById('results');
        if (filteredTrains.length === 0) {
            resultsDiv.innerHTML = '<div class="error">❌ Nessun treno trovato con i filtri selezionati.</div>';
            return;
        }
        
        resultsDiv.innerHTML = `<h3>✈️ Trovati ${filteredTrains.length} treni:</h3>`;
        for (const t of filteredTrains) {
            let transferHtml = '';
            if (t.transfers && t.transfers > 0) {
                transferHtml = `<div class="transfer-info">🔄 ${t.transfers} cambio a ${t.transferStation} (attesa ${t.transferDuration} min)</div>`;
            }
            let delayHtml = '';
            if (t.currentDelay && t.currentDelay > 0) {
                delayHtml += `<div class="delay-info" style="background:#fff3e0;">⚠️ Ritardo attuale: ${t.currentDelay} minuti</div>`;
            }
            if (t.predictedDelay !== undefined && t.predictedDelay !== null) {
                delayHtml += `<div class="delay-info" style="background:#e3f2fd;">📊 Previsione ritardo: ${t.predictedDelay} minuti</div>`;
            }
            const card = document.createElement('div');
            card.className = 'train-card';
            card.innerHTML = `
                <h3>🚆 ${t.trainCode} (${t.trainType}) - ${t.from} → ${t.to}</h3>
                <div>Partenza: ${new Date(t.departureTime).toLocaleString()} | Arrivo: ${new Date(t.arrivalTime).toLocaleString()}</div>
                <div>Durata: ${t.duration} | Prezzo: € ${t.price.toFixed(2)} (${t.travelClass})</div>
                ${transferHtml}
                ${delayHtml}
                <button class="select-btn" data-train='${JSON.stringify(t)}'>🎫 Seleziona e acquista</button>
            `;
            resultsDiv.appendChild(card);
        }
        document.querySelectorAll('.select-btn').forEach(btn => {
            btn.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
                const train = JSON.parse(btn.getAttribute('data-train'));
                selectTrain(train);
            });
        });
    }
    
    window.selectTrain = function(train) {
        const token = localStorage.getItem('token');
        if (!token) {
            alert('Devi effettuare il login per acquistare un biglietto.');
            window.location.href = 'login.html';
            return;
        }
        let runId = train.id;
        if (!runId && train.segments && train.segments.length) {
            runId = train.segments[0].runId;
        }
        const runData = {
            runId: runId,
            from: train.from,
            to: train.to,
            price: train.price,
            travelClass: train.travelClass,
            trainCode: train.trainCode,
            transfers: train.transfers,
            transferStation: train.transferStation,
            segments: train.segments
        };
        localStorage.setItem('selectedRun', JSON.stringify(runData));
        window.location.href = 'purchase.html';
    };
    
    function setupFilterUI() {
        const timeFilterSelect = document.getElementById('timeFilter');
        const timeValueGroup = document.getElementById('timeValueGroup');
        const timeRangeGroup = document.getElementById('timeRangeGroup');
        
        timeFilterSelect.addEventListener('change', () => {
            const val = timeFilterSelect.value;
            timeValueGroup.style.display = 'none';
            timeRangeGroup.style.display = 'none';
            if (val === 'after' || val === 'arrival_by') {
                timeValueGroup.style.display = 'block';
                document.getElementById('timeValue').value = '';
            } else if (val === 'range') {
                timeRangeGroup.style.display = 'block';
            }
        });
        
        document.getElementById('applyFiltersBtn').addEventListener('click', applyFiltersAndRender);
        document.getElementById('sortBy').addEventListener('change', applyFiltersAndRender);
    }
    
    document.getElementById('setFromMarker').onclick = () => {
        if (selectedStation) {
            document.getElementById('fromInput').value = selectedStation.name;
            alert(`✅ Partenza impostata a ${selectedStation.name}`);
        } else alert('⚠️ Clicca prima su un marker sulla mappa.');
    };
    document.getElementById('setToMarker').onclick = () => {
        if (selectedStation) {
            document.getElementById('toInput').value = selectedStation.name;
            alert(`✅ Arrivo impostato a ${selectedStation.name}`);
        } else alert('⚠️ Clicca prima su un marker sulla mappa.');
    };
    document.getElementById('dateInput').valueAsDate = new Date();
    document.getElementById('searchBtn').onclick = searchTrains;
    
    loadStationsAndInitMap();
    setupFilterUI();
    
    // Applica lingua dopo che tutti gli elementi sono nel DOM e le funzioni definite
    document.getElementById('langSelect').value = currentLang;
    setLanguage(currentLang);
    document.getElementById('langSelect').addEventListener('change', (e) => setLanguage(e.target.value));
    
    // Cookie banner
    if (!localStorage.getItem('cookieChoice')) {
        document.getElementById('cookieBanner').style.display = 'block';
    }
    document.getElementById('acceptCookies').onclick = () => {
        localStorage.setItem('cookieChoice', 'accepted');
        document.getElementById('cookieBanner').style.display = 'none';
        alert('Grazie, i tuoi dati verranno usati per la ricerca del gruppo 104 in un server molto sicuro (quello di Matteo)');
    };
    document.getElementById('rejectCookies').onclick = () => {
        localStorage.setItem('cookieChoice', 'rejected');
        document.getElementById('cookieBanner').style.display = 'none';
        alert('ok, chill va bene lo stesso :(');
    };
</script>
</body>
</html>

<script>
    const token = localStorage.getItem('token');
    const role = localStorage.getItem('userRole');
    if (!token || role !== 'inspector') {
        alert('Accesso negato. Devi fare login come ispettore.');
        window.location.href = 'login.html';
    }

    let html5QrCode = null;

    async function validateTicket(ticketId) {
        const res = await fetch('/api/validate', {
            method: 'POST',
            headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json', 'Authorization': `Bearer ${token}` },
            body: JSON.stringify({ ticketId: parseInt(ticketId) })
        });
        const data = await res.json();
        const resultDiv = document.getElementById('validationResult');
        if (data.valid) {
            resultDiv.innerHTML = `<div class="success">✅ Biglietto valido! ${data.message}</div>`;
        } else {
            resultDiv.innerHTML = `<div class="error">❌ ${data.message}</div>`;
        }
    }

    document.getElementById('validateBtn').onclick = () => {
        const ticketId = document.getElementById('ticketCode').value.trim();
        if (!ticketId) {
            alert('Inserisci un codice biglietto');
            return;
        }
        validateTicket(ticketId);
    };

    document.getElementById('scanBtn').onclick = () => {
        const readerDiv = document.getElementById('reader');
        if (html5QrCode) {
            // Ferma eventuale scanner attivo
            html5QrCode.stop().then(() => {
                html5QrCode = null;
                readerDiv.style.display = 'none';
            }).catch(err => console.log(err));
        } else {
            readerDiv.style.display = 'block';
            html5QrCode = new Html5Qrcode("reader");
            const qrCodeSuccessCallback = (decodedText, decodedResult) => {
                // decodedText è il testo del QR (dovrebbe essere l'ID del biglietto)
                console.log(`QR letto: ${decodedText}`);
                html5QrCode.stop();
                html5QrCode = null;
                readerDiv.style.display = 'none';
                document.getElementById('ticketCode').value = decodedText;
                validateTicket(decodedText);
            };
            const config = { fps: 10, qrbox: { width: 250, height: 250 } };
            html5QrCode.start({ facingMode: "environment" }, config, qrCodeSuccessCallback);
        }
    };

    document.getElementById('scheduleBtn').onclick = async () => {
        const res = await fetch('/api/inspector/schedule/3001', {
            headers: { 'Authorization': `Bearer ${token}` }
        });
        const data = await res.json();
        if (data.shifts && data.shifts.length) {
            document.getElementById('scheduleResult').innerHTML = data.shifts.map(s => `<p>📅 ${s.date} ${s.startTime}-${s.endTime} - ${s.route} (${s.trainCode})</p>`).join('');
        } else {
            document.getElementById('scheduleResult').innerHTML = '<div class="error">Nessun turno trovato</div>';
        }
    };
</script>
</body>
</html>

<script>
    // ----- TRADUZIONI -----
    const translations = {
        it: { title: "🔐 Accesso", login_btn: "Accedi", no_account: "Non hai un account?", register_now: "Registrati ora", demo_note: "Demo: puoi registrare un nuovo utente oppure usare admin@railway.it con password \"password\"", cookie_text: "🍪 Questo sito utilizza cookie per migliorare l'esperienza.", accept: "Accetta", reject: "Rifiuta" },
        en: { title: "🔐 Login", login_btn: "Login", no_account: "Don't have an account?", register_now: "Register now", demo_note: "Demo: you can register a new user or use admin@railway.it with password \"password\"", cookie_text: "🍪 This site uses cookies to improve your experience.", accept: "Accept", reject: "Reject" },
        de: { title: "🔐 Anmelden", login_btn: "Anmelden", no_account: "Kein Konto?", register_now: "Jetzt registrieren", demo_note: "Demo: Sie können einen neuen Benutzer registrieren oder admin@railway.it mit Passwort \"password\" verwenden", cookie_text: "🍪 Diese Website verwendet Cookies, um Ihr Erlebnis zu verbessern.", accept: "Akzeptieren", reject: "Ablehnen" }
    };
    let currentLang = localStorage.getItem('lang') || 'it';
    function setLanguage(lang) {
        currentLang = lang; localStorage.setItem('lang', lang);
        document.querySelectorAll('[data-i18n]').forEach(el => { const key = el.getAttribute('data-i18n'); if (translations[lang] && translations[lang][key]) el.innerText = translations[lang][key]; });
        const token = localStorage.getItem('token'); if (token) fetch('/api/language', { method: 'POST', headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json', 'Authorization': `Bearer ${token}` }, body: JSON.stringify({ language: lang }) }).catch(e=>console.warn);
    }
    document.getElementById('langSelect').value = currentLang; setLanguage(currentLang);
    document.getElementById('langSelect').addEventListener('change', e => setLanguage(e.target.value));

    // ----- LOGIN -----
    const loginBtn = document.getElementById('loginBtn');
    const msgDiv = document.getElementById('message');
    loginBtn.onclick = async () => {
        const email = document.getElementById('email').value;
        const password = document.getElementById('password').value;
        msgDiv.innerHTML = '<div class="info">⏳ Caricamento...</div>';
        try {
            const res = await fetch('/api/login', { method: 'POST', headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' }, body: JSON.stringify({ email, password }) });
            const data = await res.json();
            if (res.ok && data.success) {
                localStorage.setItem('token', data.token); localStorage.setItem('userId', data.user.id); localStorage.setItem('userRole', data.user.role);
                msgDiv.innerHTML = `<div class="success">✅ Login riuscito! Redirect in corso...</div>`;
                setTimeout(() => {
                    if (data.user.role === 'administrator') window.location.href = 'admin.html';
                    else if (data.user.role === 'inspector') window.location.href = 'inspector.html';
                    else window.location.href = 'dashboard.html';
                }, 1500);
            } else msgDiv.innerHTML = `<div class="error">❌ ${data.message || 'Credenziali errate'}</div>`;
        } catch (err) { msgDiv.innerHTML = `<div class="error">⚠️ Errore di connessione: ${err.message}</div>`; }
    };

    // Cookie banner
    if (!localStorage.getItem('cookieChoice')) document.getElementById('cookieBanner').style.display = 'block';
    document.getElementById('acceptCookies').onclick = () => {
        localStorage.setItem('cookieChoice', 'accepted');
        document.getElementById('cookieBanner').style.display = 'none';
        alert(translations[currentLang]?.cookie_accept_msg || 'Grazie, i tuoi dati verranno usati per la ricerca del gruppo 104 in un server molto sicuro (quello di Matteo)');
    };
    document.getElementById('rejectCookies').onclick = () => {
        localStorage.setItem('cookieChoice', 'rejected');
        document.getElementById('cookieBanner').style.display = 'none';
        alert(translations[currentLang]?.cookie_reject_msg || 'ok, chill va bene lo stesso :(');
    };
</script>

<script>
    // -------------------- TRADUZIONI --------------------
    const translations = {
        it: { title: "🎫 Acquisto biglietti", points_available: "⭐ Punti disponibili:", use_points: "Usa punti (1 punto = 0.10 € sconto):", passengers_label: "Numero di passeggeri (incluso te):", apply_btn: "Applica", bike_label: "🚲 Posti bici (max 2 a persona):", luggage_label: "🧳 Bagaglio:", small: "Piccolo (5€)", medium: "Medio (8€)", large: "Grande (12€)", total_before: "Totale prima sconto:", discount_amount: "Sconto punti:", total_final: "Totale finale:", confirm_payment: "Conferma pagamento", cookie_text: "🍪 Questo sito utilizza cookie per migliorare l'esperienza.", accept: "Accetta", reject: "Rifiuta" },
        en: { title: "🎫 Buy tickets", points_available: "⭐ Points available:", use_points: "Use points (1 point = 0.10 € discount):", passengers_label: "Number of passengers (including you):", apply_btn: "Apply", bike_label: "🚲 Bike spaces (max 2 per person):", luggage_label: "🧳 Luggage:", small: "Small (5€)", medium: "Medium (8€)", large: "Large (12€)", total_before: "Total before discount:", discount_amount: "Points discount:", total_final: "Final total:", confirm_payment: "Confirm payment", cookie_text: "🍪 This site uses cookies to improve your experience.", accept: "Accept", reject: "Reject" },
        de: { title: "🎫 Tickets kaufen", points_available: "⭐ Verfügbare Punkte:", use_points: "Punkte verwenden (1 Punkt = 0,10 € Rabatt):", passengers_label: "Anzahl der Passagiere (inkl. Ihnen):", apply_btn: "Anwenden", bike_label: "🚲 Fahrradstellplätze (max 2 pro Person):", luggage_label: "🧳 Gepäck:", small: "Klein (5€)", medium: "Mittel (8€)", large: "Groß (12€)", total_before: "Gesamt vor Rabatt:", discount_amount: "Punkterabatt:", total_final: "Endsumme:", confirm_payment: "Zahlung bestätigen", cookie_text: "🍪 Diese Website verwendet Cookies, um Ihr Erlebnis zu verbessern.", accept: "Akzeptieren", reject: "Ablehnen" }
    };

    let currentLang = localStorage.getItem('lang') || 'it';
    function setLanguage(lang) {
        currentLang = lang; localStorage.setItem('lang', lang);
        document.querySelectorAll('[data-i18n]').forEach(el => {
            const key = el.getAttribute('data-i18n');
            if (translations[lang] && translations[lang][key]) el.innerText = translations[lang][key];
        });
        document.querySelectorAll('select option[data-i18n]').forEach(opt => {
            const key = opt.getAttribute('data-i18n');
            if (translations[lang] && translations[lang][key]) opt.innerText = translations[lang][key];
        });
        const token = localStorage.getItem('token');
        if (token) fetch('/api/language', { method: 'POST', headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json', 'Authorization': `Bearer ${token}` }, body: JSON.stringify({ language: lang }) }).catch(e=>console.warn);
        // Non chiamare updateTotal qui perché potrebbe non essere ancora definita
    }

    // -------------------- VARIABILI GLOBALI --------------------
    const token = localStorage.getItem('token');
    if (!token) window.location.href = 'login.html';
    const runData = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('selectedRun'));
    if (!runData) window.location.href = 'index.html';

    let seatMap = null;
    let currentPassengers = 1;
    let passengerSelections = [];
    let userPoints = 0;

    // -------------------- CARICAMENTO INFORMAZIONI TRENO (incluso ritardo) --------------------
    async function loadTrainInfo() {
        try {
            const res = await fetch(`/api/train-status/${runData.runId}`);
            if (res.ok) {
                const train = await res.json();
                if (train.currentDelay > 0) {
                    const delayDiv = document.getElementById('delayInfo');
                    delayDiv.style.display = 'block';
                    delayDiv.innerHTML = `⚠️ Il treno attualmente ha un ritardo di ${train.currentDelay} minuti. L'orario di partenza potrebbe subire variazioni.`;
                }
            }
        } catch (err) { console.warn('Errore caricamento ritardo:', err); }
    }

    // -------------------- CARICAMENTO PUNTI --------------------
    async function loadUserPoints() {
        try {
            const res = await fetch('/api/user/points', { headers: { 'Authorization': `Bearer ${token}` } });
            if (res.ok) { const data = await res.json(); userPoints = data.points || 0; document.getElementById('userPoints').innerText = userPoints; const usedPointsInput = document.getElementById('usedPoints'); usedPointsInput.max = userPoints; usedPointsInput.placeholder = `max ${userPoints}`; }
        } catch (err) { console.error('Errore recupero punti:', err); }
    }

    // -------------------- MAPPA POSTI --------------------
    async function loadSeatMap() {
        try {
            const res = await fetch(`/api/seat-map/${runData.runId}`, { headers: { 'Authorization': `Bearer ${token}` } });
            if (res.status === 401) { alert('Sessione scaduta.'); localStorage.removeItem('token'); window.location.href = 'login.html'; return; }
            if (!res.ok) throw new Error('Impossibile caricare la mappa posti');
            seatMap = await res.json();
            renderPassengers();
        } catch (err) { document.getElementById('result').innerHTML = `<div class="error">❌ ${err.message}</div>`; }
    }

    function savePassengerInputs() {
        for (let i = 0; i < currentPassengers; i++) {
            const nameInput = document.getElementById(`name${i}`), surnameInput = document.getElementById(`surname${i}`);
            if (nameInput && surnameInput) {
                if (!passengerSelections[i]) passengerSelections[i] = {};
                passengerSelections[i].name = nameInput.value;
                passengerSelections[i].surname = surnameInput.value;
            }
        }
    }

    function renderPassengers() {
        savePassengerInputs();
        const container = document.getElementById('passengersContainer');
        container.innerHTML = '';
        while (passengerSelections.length < currentPassengers) passengerSelections.push({ seatNumber: null, coachNumber: null, name: '', surname: '', price: runData.price });
        passengerSelections = passengerSelections.slice(0, currentPassengers);

        for (let i = 0; i < currentPassengers; i++) {
            const passengerDiv = document.createElement('div'); passengerDiv.className = 'passenger-card';
            passengerDiv.innerHTML = `<h4>Passeggero ${i+1}</h4><div class="passenger-fields"><label>Nome: <input type="text" id="name${i}" value="${escapeHtml(passengerSelections[i].name || '')}" placeholder="Nome"></label><label>Cognome: <input type="text" id="surname${i}" value="${escapeHtml(passengerSelections[i].surname || '')}" placeholder="Cognome"></label></div><div><strong>Seleziona posto:</strong></div><div id="seats-coach-${i}"></div>`;
            container.appendChild(passengerDiv);
            const seatsContainer = passengerDiv.querySelector(`#seats-coach-${i}`);
            if (seatMap) renderSeatMapForPassenger(seatsContainer, i);
            else seatsContainer.innerHTML = '<div class="error">Mappa posti non disponibile</div>';
        }
        updateTotal();
    }

    function renderSeatMapForPassenger(container, passengerIdx) {
        container.innerHTML = '';
        seatMap.coaches.forEach(coach => {
            const coachDiv = document.createElement('div'); coachDiv.className = 'coach';
            coachDiv.innerHTML = `<strong>Carrozza ${coach.coachNumber} (${coach.coachClass})</strong><div class="train-direction">🚂 Direzione marcia →</div>`;
            const seatsWrapper = document.createElement('div'); seatsWrapper.className = 'seats-container'; coachDiv.appendChild(seatsWrapper); container.appendChild(coachDiv);
            const seatsByRow = new Map();
            coach.seats.forEach(seat => { const row = parseInt(seat.seatNumber.match(/\d+/)[0]); if (!seatsByRow.has(row)) seatsByRow.set(row, []); seatsByRow.get(row).push(seat); });
            const sortedRows = Array.from(seatsByRow.keys()).sort((a,b)=>a-b);
            sortedRows.forEach(row => {
                const seatsRow = seatsByRow.get(row); seatsRow.sort((a,b) => a.seatNumber.localeCompare(b.seatNumber));
                const leftSeats = seatsRow.filter(s => ['A','B','C','D'].includes(s.seatNumber.slice(-1)));
                const rightSeats = seatsRow.filter(s => ['E','F','G','H'].includes(s.seatNumber.slice(-1)));
                const rowDiv = document.createElement('div'); rowDiv.className = 'seat-row';
                const leftBlock = document.createElement('div'); leftBlock.className = 'seat-block';
                const topLeft = document.createElement('div'); topLeft.className = 'seat-group'; const bottomLeft = document.createElement('div'); bottomLeft.className = 'seat-group';
                leftSeats.forEach(seat => { const seatBtn = createSeatButton(seat, passengerIdx, coach.coachNumber); const letter = seat.seatNumber.slice(-1); if (letter === 'A' || letter === 'B') topLeft.appendChild(seatBtn); else bottomLeft.appendChild(seatBtn); });
                leftBlock.appendChild(topLeft); leftBlock.appendChild(bottomLeft);
                const aisle = document.createElement('div'); aisle.className = 'aisle'; aisle.innerHTML = '&nbsp;';
                const rightBlock = document.createElement('div'); rightBlock.className = 'seat-block';
                const topRight = document.createElement('div'); topRight.className = 'seat-group'; const bottomRight = document.createElement('div'); bottomRight.className = 'seat-group';
                rightSeats.forEach(seat => { const seatBtn = createSeatButton(seat, passengerIdx, coach.coachNumber); const letter = seat.seatNumber.slice(-1); if (letter === 'E' || letter === 'F') topRight.appendChild(seatBtn); else bottomRight.appendChild(seatBtn); });
                rightBlock.appendChild(topRight); rightBlock.appendChild(bottomRight);
                rowDiv.appendChild(leftBlock); rowDiv.appendChild(aisle); rowDiv.appendChild(rightBlock); seatsWrapper.appendChild(rowDiv);
            });
        });
    }

    function createSeatButton(seat, passengerIdx, coachNumber) {
        const displayLabel = `C${coachNumber}-${seat.seatNumber}`;
        const seatBtn = document.createElement('div'); seatBtn.className = `seat ${seat.status}`;
        if (seat.status === 'free') seatBtn.classList.add('free');
        else if (seat.status === 'taken') seatBtn.classList.add('taken');
        seatBtn.textContent = displayLabel;
        if (seat.status === 'free') seatBtn.onclick = (e) => { e.stopPropagation(); selectSeat(passengerIdx, seat.seatNumber, coachNumber); };
        if (passengerSelections[passengerIdx] && passengerSelections[passengerIdx].seatNumber === seat.seatNumber && passengerSelections[passengerIdx].coachNumber === coachNumber) seatBtn.classList.add('selected');
        return seatBtn;
    }

    function selectSeat(passengerIndex, seatNumber, coachNumber) {
        const alreadyTaken = passengerSelections.some((p, idx) => idx !== passengerIndex && p.seatNumber === seatNumber && p.coachNumber === coachNumber);
        if (alreadyTaken) { alert(`Posto Carrozza ${coachNumber} - ${seatNumber} già selezionato da un altro passeggero.`); return; }
        savePassengerInputs();
        passengerSelections[passengerIndex].seatNumber = seatNumber;
        passengerSelections[passengerIndex].coachNumber = coachNumber;
        const container = document.getElementById(`seats-coach-${passengerIndex}`);
        if (container) renderSeatMapForPassenger(container, passengerIndex);
        updateTotal();
    }

    function getBaseTotal() {
        let total = 0;
        for (let i = 0; i < currentPassengers; i++) total += passengerSelections[i]?.price || runData.price;
        const bikeCount = parseInt(document.getElementById('bikeCount').value) || 0;
        const luggageCount = parseInt(document.getElementById('luggageCount').value) || 0;
        total += (bikeCount * 5) * currentPassengers;
        total += (luggageCount * 8) * currentPassengers;
        return total;
    }

    function updateTotal() {
        const baseTotal = getBaseTotal();
        document.getElementById('totalBeforeDiscount').innerText = baseTotal.toFixed(2);
        const usedPoints = parseInt(document.getElementById('usedPoints').value) || 0;
        let validPoints = Math.min(usedPoints, userPoints);
        if (validPoints < 0) validPoints = 0;
        const discount = validPoints * 0.10;
        const finalTotal = Math.max(0, baseTotal - discount);
        document.getElementById('discountAmount').innerText = discount.toFixed(2);
        document.getElementById('totalPrice').innerText = finalTotal.toFixed(2);
        document.getElementById('discountInfo').innerHTML = `Sconto applicato: ${discount.toFixed(2)} € (${validPoints} punti)`;
    }

    function escapeHtml(str) { if (!str) return ''; return str.replace(/[&<>]/g, m => ({ '&':'&amp;', '<':'&lt;', '>':'&gt;' }[m])); }

    // -------------------- EVENTI --------------------
    document.getElementById('applyCount').onclick = () => {
        let newCount = parseInt(document.getElementById('passengerCount').value);
        if (newCount < 1) newCount = 1;
        if (newCount > 6) newCount = 6;
        currentPassengers = newCount;
        renderPassengers();
    };

    document.getElementById('buyBtn').onclick = async () => {
        const passengers = [];
        for (let i = 0; i < currentPassengers; i++) {
            const name = document.getElementById(`name${i}`)?.value || 'Passeggero';
            const surname = document.getElementById(`surname${i}`)?.value || '';
            const seatNumber = passengerSelections[i]?.seatNumber;
            if (!seatNumber) { alert(`Seleziona un posto per il passeggero ${i+1}`); return; }
            passengers.push({ name, surname, seatNumber, passengerType: 'adult', travelClass: runData.travelClass, price: runData.price, fromStopOrder: 1, toStopOrder: 4 });
        }
        const extras = [];
        const bikeCount = parseInt(document.getElementById('bikeCount').value) || 0;
        const luggageCount = parseInt(document.getElementById('luggageCount').value) || 0;
        const luggageSize = document.getElementById('luggageSize').value;
        let luggagePrice = 5; if (luggageSize === 'medium') luggagePrice = 8; else if (luggageSize === 'large') luggagePrice = 12;
        for (let i = 0; i < bikeCount; i++) extras.push({ type: 'bike', price: 5 });
        for (let i = 0; i < luggageCount; i++) extras.push({ type: 'luggage', size: luggageSize, price: luggagePrice });
        const usedPoints = parseInt(document.getElementById('usedPoints').value) || 0;
        const payload = { runId: runData.runId, passengers, extras, usedPoints: Math.min(usedPoints, userPoints) };
        try {
            const res = await fetch('/api/purchase', { method: 'POST', headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json', 'Authorization': `Bearer ${token}` }, body: JSON.stringify(payload) });
            if (res.status === 401) throw new Error('Sessione scaduta');
            const data = await res.json();
            if (data.success) {
                document.getElementById('result').innerHTML = `<div class="success">✅ Acquisto riuscito! Biglietti: ${data.tickets.join(', ')}. Sconto applicato: € ${data.discountApplied.toFixed(2)}</div>`;
                localStorage.removeItem('selectedRun');
                setTimeout(() => window.location.href = 'dashboard.html', 3000);
            } else document.getElementById('result').innerHTML = `<div class="error">❌ ${data.message || 'Errore sconosciuto'}</div>`;
        } catch (err) {
            if (err.message === 'Sessione scaduta') { alert('Sessione scaduta.'); localStorage.removeItem('token'); window.location.href = 'login.html'; }
            else document.getElementById('result').innerHTML = `<div class="error">Errore: ${err.message}</div>`;
        }
    };

    document.getElementById('bikeCount').addEventListener('input', updateTotal);
    document.getElementById('luggageCount').addEventListener('input', updateTotal);
    document.getElementById('usedPoints').addEventListener('input', updateTotal);

    // -------------------- AVVIO --------------------
    document.getElementById('tripInfo').innerHTML = `<p><strong>${runData.from} → ${runData.to}</strong><br>Treno: ${runData.trainCode || '---'} (${runData.travelClass})<br>Prezzo base a persona: € ${runData.price.toFixed(2)}</p>`;
    
    // Imposta lingua dopo che tutto è definito
    document.getElementById('langSelect').value = currentLang;
    setLanguage(currentLang);
    document.getElementById('langSelect').addEventListener('change', e => setLanguage(e.target.value));

    loadTrainInfo();
    loadUserPoints();
    loadSeatMap();

    // Cookie banner
    if (!localStorage.getItem('cookieChoice')) document.getElementById('cookieBanner').style.display = 'block';
    document.getElementById('acceptCookies').onclick = () => { localStorage.setItem('cookieChoice', 'accepted'); document.getElementById('cookieBanner').style.display = 'none'; alert(translations[currentLang]?.cookie_accept_msg || 'Grazie, i tuoi dati verranno usati per la ricerca del gruppo 104 in un server molto sicuro (quello di Matteo)'); };
    document.getElementById('rejectCookies').onclick = () => { localStorage.setItem('cookieChoice', 'rejected'); document.getElementById('cookieBanner').style.display = 'none'; alert(translations[currentLang]?.cookie_reject_msg || 'ok, chill va bene lo stesso :('); };
</script>
</body>

<script>
    // ----- TRADUZIONI -----
    const translations = {
        it: { title: "🚆 Crea un account", sub: "Accedi a tutti i servizi di prenotazione", name: "Nome", surname: "Cognome", email: "Email", password: "Password", confirm_password: "Conferma password", register_btn: "📝 Registrati", have_account: "Hai già un account?", login_link: "Accedi qui", gdpr_note: "La registrazione è gratuita. I tuoi dati saranno trattati in conformità al GDPR.", cookie_text: "🍪 Questo sito utilizza cookie per migliorare l'esperienza.", accept: "Accetta", reject: "Rifiuta" },
        en: { title: "🚆 Create an account", sub: "Access all booking services", name: "First name", surname: "Last name", email: "Email", password: "Password", confirm_password: "Confirm password", register_btn: "📝 Register", have_account: "Already have an account?", login_link: "Login here", gdpr_note: "Registration is free. Your data will be processed in accordance with GDPR.", cookie_text: "🍪 This site uses cookies to improve your experience.", accept: "Accept", reject: "Reject" },
        de: { title: "🚆 Konto erstellen", sub: "Alle Buchungsdienste nutzen", name: "Vorname", surname: "Nachname", email: "E-Mail", password: "Passwort", confirm_password: "Passwort bestätigen", register_btn: "📝 Registrieren", have_account: "Bereits ein Konto?", login_link: "Hier anmelden", gdpr_note: "Die Registrierung ist kostenlos. Ihre Daten werden gemäß der DSGVO verarbeitet.", cookie_text: "🍪 Diese Website verwendet Cookies, um Ihr Erlebnis zu verbessern.", accept: "Akzeptieren", reject: "Ablehnen" }
    };
    let currentLang = localStorage.getItem('lang') || 'it';
    function setLanguage(lang) {
        currentLang = lang; localStorage.setItem('lang', lang);
        document.querySelectorAll('[data-i18n]').forEach(el => { const key = el.getAttribute('data-i18n'); if (translations[lang] && translations[lang][key]) el.innerText = translations[lang][key]; });
        const token = localStorage.getItem('token'); if (token) fetch('/api/language', { method: 'POST', headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json', 'Authorization': `Bearer ${token}` }, body: JSON.stringify({ language: lang }) }).catch(e=>console.warn);
    }
    document.getElementById('langSelect').value = currentLang; setLanguage(currentLang);
    document.getElementById('langSelect').addEventListener('change', e => setLanguage(e.target.value));

    // ----- LOGICA REGISTRAZIONE -----
    const registerBtn = document.getElementById('registerBtn');
    const messageDiv = document.getElementById('message');
    function showMessage(text, isError = true) {
        messageDiv.innerHTML = `<div class="${isError ? 'error' : 'success'}">${text}</div>`;
        if (!isError) setTimeout(() => window.location.href = 'login.html', 1500);
    }
    async function registerUser(name, surname, email, password) {
        try {
            const response = await fetch('/api/register', { method: 'POST', headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' }, body: JSON.stringify({ name, surname, email, password }) });
            const data = await response.json();
            if (data.success) showMessage('✅ Registrazione completata! Redirezione al login...', false);
            else showMessage('❌ ' + (data.message || 'Errore durante la registrazione.'));
        } catch (err) { showMessage('❌ Errore di rete: ' + err.message); }
    }
    registerBtn.addEventListener('click', () => {
        messageDiv.innerHTML = '';
        const name = document.getElementById('name').value.trim();
        const surname = document.getElementById('surname').value.trim();
        const email = document.getElementById('email').value.trim();
        const password = document.getElementById('password').value;
        const confirm = document.getElementById('confirmPassword').value;
        if (!name || !surname || !email || !password) { showMessage('⚠️ Tutti i campi sono obbligatori.'); return; }
        if (password.length < 8) { showMessage('⚠️ La password deve essere lunga almeno 8 caratteri.'); return; }
        if (password !== confirm) { showMessage('⚠️ Le password non coincidono.'); return; }
        if (!email.includes('@') || !email.includes('.')) { showMessage('⚠️ Inserisci un indirizzo email valido.'); return; }
        registerBtn.disabled = true; registerBtn.textContent = 'Registrazione in corso...';
        registerUser(name, surname, email, password).finally(() => { registerBtn.disabled = false; registerBtn.textContent = '📝 Registrati'; });
    });
    // Cookie banner
    if (!localStorage.getItem('cookieChoice')) document.getElementById('cookieBanner').style.display = 'block';
    document.getElementById('acceptCookies').onclick = () => {
        localStorage.setItem('cookieChoice', 'accepted');
        document.getElementById('cookieBanner').style.display = 'none';
        alert(translations[currentLang]?.cookie_accept_msg || 'Grazie, i tuoi dati verranno usati per la ricerca del gruppo 104 in un server molto sicuro (quello di Matteo)');
    };
    document.getElementById('rejectCookies').onclick = () => {
        localStorage.setItem('cookieChoice', 'rejected');
        document.getElementById('cookieBanner').style.display = 'none';
        alert(translations[currentLang]?.cookie_reject_msg || 'ok, chill va bene lo stesso :(');
    };
</script>

<script>
    // ----- TRADUZIONI -----
    const translations = {
        it: {
            title: "🎫 Acquista Abbonamento",
            buy: "Acquista",
            cookie_text: "🍪 Questo sito utilizza cookie per migliorare l'esperienza.",
            accept: "Accetta",
            reject: "Rifiuta",
            one_month: "1 mese",
            three_months: "3 mesi",
            six_months: "6 mesi",
            twelve_months: "12 mesi",
            standard: "Standard",
            business: "Business"
        },
        en: {
            title: "🎫 Buy Subscription",
            buy: "Buy",
            cookie_text: "🍪 This site uses cookies to improve your experience.",
            accept: "Accept",
            reject: "Reject",
            one_month: "1 month",
            three_months: "3 months",
            six_months: "6 months",
            twelve_months: "12 months",
            standard: "Standard",
            business: "Business"
        },
        de: {
            title: "🎫 Abo kaufen",
            buy: "Kaufen",
            cookie_text: "🍪 Diese Website verwendet Cookies, um Ihr Erlebnis zu verbessern.",
            accept: "Akzeptieren",
            reject: "Ablehnen",
            one_month: "1 Monat",
            three_months: "3 Monate",
            six_months: "6 Monate",
            twelve_months: "12 Monate",
            standard: "Standard",
            business: "Business"
        }
    };

    let currentLang = localStorage.getItem('lang') || 'it';

    function setLanguage(lang) {
        currentLang = lang;
        localStorage.setItem('lang', lang);
        document.querySelectorAll('[data-i18n]').forEach(el => {
            const key = el.getAttribute('data-i18n');
            if (translations[lang] && translations[lang][key]) {
                if (el.tagName === 'SELECT') {
                    // per i select non cambiamo il valore, ma le option
                } else {
                    el.innerText = translations[lang][key];
                }
            }
        });
        document.querySelectorAll('select option[data-i18n]').forEach(opt => {
            const key = opt.getAttribute('data-i18n');
            if (translations[lang] && translations[lang][key]) {
                opt.innerText = translations[lang][key];
            }
        });
        const token = localStorage.getItem('token');
        if (token) {
            fetch('/api/language', {
                method: 'POST',
                headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json', 'Authorization': `Bearer ${token}` },
                body: JSON.stringify({ language: lang })
            }).catch(e => console.warn('Errore salvataggio lingua:', e));
        }
    }

    document.getElementById('langSelect').value = currentLang;
    setLanguage(currentLang);
    document.getElementById('langSelect').addEventListener('change', e => setLanguage(e.target.value));

    // ----- LOGICA SUBSCRIPTION -----
    const token = localStorage.getItem('token');
    if (!token) {
        alert('Devi effettuare il login per acquistare un abbonamento');
        window.location.href = 'login.html';
    }

    fetch('/api/stations')
        .then(res => res.json())
        .then(stations => {
            const fromSel = document.getElementById('fromStation');
            const toSel = document.getElementById('toStation');
            stations.forEach(s => {
                fromSel.appendChild(new Option(`${s.name} (${s.city})`, s.stationId));
                toSel.appendChild(new Option(`${s.name} (${s.city})`, s.stationId));
            });
        })
        .catch(err => console.error('Errore caricamento stazioni:', err));

    document.getElementById('buyBtn').onclick = async () => {
        const fromStationId = document.getElementById('fromStation').value;
        const toStationId = document.getElementById('toStation').value;
        const durationMonths = parseInt(document.getElementById('duration').value);
        const travelClass = document.getElementById('travelClass').value;

        if (!fromStationId || !toStationId) {
            alert('Seleziona entrambe le stazioni');
            return;
        }

        try {
            const res = await fetch('/api/subscription', {
                method: 'POST',
                headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json', 'Authorization': `Bearer ${token}` },
                body: JSON.stringify({ fromStationId, toStationId, durationMonths, travelClass })
            });
            const data = await res.json();
            if (data.success) {
                document.getElementById('result').innerHTML = `<div style="color:green">✅ Abbonamento #${data.subscriptionId} acquistato!</div>`;
            } else {
                document.getElementById('result').innerHTML = `<div style="color:red">❌ ${data.message}</div>`;
            }
        } catch (err) {
            document.getElementById('result').innerHTML = `<div style="color:red">Errore: ${err.message}</div>`;
        }
    };

    // Cookie banner
    if (!localStorage.getItem('cookieChoice')) {
        document.getElementById('cookieBanner').style.display = 'block';
    }
    document.getElementById('acceptCookies').onclick = () => {
        localStorage.setItem('cookieChoice', 'accepted');
        document.getElementById('cookieBanner').style.display = 'none';
        alert(translations[currentLang]?.cookie_accept_msg || 'Grazie, i tuoi dati verranno usati per la ricerca del gruppo 104 in un server molto sicuro (quello di Matteo)');
    };
    document.getElementById('rejectCookies').onclick = () => {
        localStorage.setItem('cookieChoice', 'rejected');
        document.getElementById('cookieBanner').style.display = 'none';
        alert(translations[currentLang]?.cookie_reject_msg || 'ok, chill va bene lo stesso :(');
    };
</script>

<script>
    // ----- TRADUZIONI -----
    const translations = {
        it: {
            title: "📞 Contatta il supporto", description: "Compila il modulo per richiedere informazioni, un rimborso o segnalare un problema.",
