            request_type: "Anfrageart", refund: "💰 Rückerstattung", information: "ℹ️ Information", complaint: "⚠️ Beschwerde", other: "📝 Sonstiges",
            ticket_number: "Ticketnummer (optional)", description_label: "Beschreibung des Problems / der Anfrage", submit: "Anfrage senden",
            back_home: "← Zurück zur Startseite", cookie_text: "🍪 Diese Website verwendet Cookies, um Ihr Erlebnis zu verbessern.", accept: "Akzeptieren", reject: "Ablehnen",
            login_required: "Sie müssen angemeldet sein, um den Support zu kontaktieren", fill_description: "Bitte beschreiben Sie Ihre Anfrage.",
            success: "✅ Anfrage erfolgreich gesendet. Sie erhalten innerhalb von 48 Stunden eine Antwort per E-Mail.",
            error_generic: "❌ Fehler: Anfrage konnte nicht gesendet werden", network_error: "Netzwerkfehler"
        }
    };

    let currentLang = localStorage.getItem('lang') || 'it';
    function setLanguage(lang) {
        currentLang = lang;
        localStorage.setItem('lang', lang);
        document.querySelectorAll('[data-i18n]').forEach(el => {
            const key = el.getAttribute('data-i18n');
            if (translations[lang] && translations[lang][key]) {
                if (el.tagName === 'INPUT' || el.tagName === 'TEXTAREA' || el.tagName === 'SELECT') {
                    if (el.hasAttribute('placeholder')) el.placeholder = translations[lang][key];
                    else if (el.tagName !== 'SELECT') el.innerText = translations[lang][key];
                } else {
                    el.innerText = translations[lang][key];
                }
            }
        });
        document.querySelectorAll('select option[data-i18n]').forEach(opt => {
            const key = opt.getAttribute('data-i18n');
            if (translations[lang] && translations[lang][key]) opt.innerText = translations[lang][key];
        });
        const token = localStorage.getItem('token');
        if (token) {
            fetch('/api/language', { method: 'POST', headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json', 'Authorization': `Bearer ${token}` }, body: JSON.stringify({ language: lang }) }).catch(e => console.warn);
        }
    }

    // ----- LOGICA SUPPORTO -----
    const token = localStorage.getItem('token');
    if (!token) {
        alert(translations[currentLang]?.login_required || 'Devi essere loggato per contattare il supporto');
        window.location.href = 'login.html';
    }

    document.getElementById('submitBtn').onclick = async () => {
        const requestType = document.getElementById('requestType').value;
        const ticketRef = document.getElementById('ticketRef').value;
        const description = document.getElementById('description').value;

        if (!description.trim()) {
            document.getElementById('result').innerHTML = `<div class="error">${translations[currentLang]?.fill_description || 'Per favore, descrivi la tua richiesta.'}</div>`;
            return;
        }

        try {
            const res = await fetch('/api/support', {
                method: 'POST',
                headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json', 'Authorization': `Bearer ${token}` },
                body: JSON.stringify({ requestType, ticketRef, description })
            });
            const data = await res.json();
            if (data.success) {
                document.getElementById('result').innerHTML = `<div class="success">${translations[currentLang]?.success || '✅ Richiesta inviata con successo. Riceverai risposta via email entro 48 ore.'}</div>`;
                document.getElementById('description').value = '';
                document.getElementById('ticketRef').value = '';
            } else {
                document.getElementById('result').innerHTML = `<div class="error">${translations[currentLang]?.error_generic || '❌ Errore: Impossibile inviare la richiesta'} ${data.message || ''}</div>`;
            }
        } catch (err) {
            document.getElementById('result').innerHTML = `<div class="error">${translations[currentLang]?.network_error || 'Errore di rete'}: ${err.message}</div>`;
        }
    };

    // Inizializza lingua
    document.getElementById('langSelect').value = currentLang;
    setLanguage(currentLang);
    document.getElementById('langSelect').addEventListener('change', e => setLanguage(e.target.value));

    // Cookie banner
    if (!localStorage.getItem('cookieChoice')) document.getElementById('cookieBanner').style.display = 'block';
    document.getElementById('acceptCookies').onclick = () => {
        localStorage.setItem('cookieChoice', 'accepted');
        document.getElementById('cookieBanner').style.display = 'none';
        alert(translations[currentLang]?.cookie_accept_msg || 'Grazie, i tuoi dati verranno usati per la ricerca del gruppo 104 in un server molto sicuro (quello di Matteo)');
    };
    document.getElementById('rejectCookies').onclick = () => {
        localStorage.setItem('cookieChoice', 'rejected');
        document.getElementById('cookieBanner').style.display = 'none';
        alert(translations[currentLang]?.cookie_reject_msg || 'ok, chill va bene lo stesso :(');
    };
</script>
</body>
</html>

                <option value="it">🇮🇹 IT</option>

<script>
    // ----- TRADUZIONI -----
    const translations = {
        it: {
            title: "🚉 Tabellone Partenze", select_station: "Seleziona stazione", show_departures: "Mostra partenze",
            no_departures: "Nessuna partenza per la data selezionata.", train: "Treno", destination: "Destinazione",
            time: "Orario", track: "Binario", status: "Stato", delayed: "Ritardo", minutes: "min",
            cookie_text: "🍪 Questo sito utilizza cookie per migliorare l'esperienza.", accept: "Accetta", reject: "Rifiuta"
        },
        en: {
            title: "🚉 Departures Board", select_station: "Select station", show_departures: "Show departures",
            no_departures: "No departures for the selected date.", train: "Train", destination: "Destination",
            time: "Time", track: "Platform", status: "Status", delayed: "Delayed", minutes: "min",
            cookie_text: "🍪 This site uses cookies to improve your experience.", accept: "Accept", reject: "Reject"
        },
        de: {
            title: "🚉 Abfahrttafel", select_station: "Bahnhof auswählen", show_departures: "Abfahrten anzeigen",
            no_departures: "Keine Abfahrten für das ausgewählte Datum.", train: "Zug", destination: "Ziel",
            time: "Zeit", track: "Gleis", status: "Status", delayed: "Verspätung", minutes: "min",
            cookie_text: "🍪 Diese Website verwendet Cookies, um Ihr Erlebnis zu verbessern.", accept: "Akzeptieren", reject: "Ablehnen"
        }
    };

    let currentLang = localStorage.getItem('lang') || 'it';
    function setLanguage(lang) {
        currentLang = lang;
        localStorage.setItem('lang', lang);
        document.querySelectorAll('[data-i18n]').forEach(el => {
            const key = el.getAttribute('data-i18n');
            if (translations[lang] && translations[lang][key]) {
                if (el.tagName === 'SELECT' && el.id !== 'langSelect') {
                    // non alterare le option già popolate
                } else {
                    el.innerText = translations[lang][key];
                }
            }
        });
        const token = localStorage.getItem('token');
        if (token) {
            fetch('/api/language', { method: 'POST', headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json', 'Authorization': `Bearer ${token}` }, body: JSON.stringify({ language: lang }) }).catch(e => console.warn);
        }
    }

    // ----- LOGICA TABELLONE -----
    const stationSelect = document.getElementById('stationSelect');
    const dateInput = document.getElementById('dateSelect');
    dateInput.valueAsDate = new Date();

    fetch('/api/stations')
        .then(res => res.json())
        .then(stations => {
            stations.forEach(s => {
                const opt = document.createElement('option');
                opt.value = s.stationId;
                opt.textContent = `${s.name} (${s.city})`;
                stationSelect.appendChild(opt);
            });
        })
        .catch(err => console.error('Errore caricamento stazioni:', err));

    async function loadDepartures() {
        const stationId = stationSelect.value;
        const date = dateInput.value;
        if (!stationId) return;
        try {
            const res = await fetch(`/api/departures/${stationId}?date=${date}`);
            if (!res.ok) throw new Error('Errore caricamento');
            const departures = await res.json();
            const boardDiv = document.getElementById('board');
            if (departures.length === 0) {
                boardDiv.innerHTML = `<div class="error">${translations[currentLang]?.no_departures || 'Nessuna partenza per la data selezionata.'}</div>`;
                return;
            }
            boardDiv.innerHTML = `
                <table>
                    <thead>
                        <tr><th>${translations[currentLang]?.train || 'Treno'}</th>
                            <th>${translations[currentLang]?.destination || 'Destinazione'}</th>
                            <th>${translations[currentLang]?.time || 'Orario'}</th>
                            <th>${translations[currentLang]?.track || 'Binario'}</th>
                            <th>${translations[currentLang]?.status || 'Stato'}</th>
                        </tr>
                    </thead>
                    <tbody>
                        ${departures.map(d => `
                            <tr>
                                <td>${d.trainCode}</td>
                                <td>${d.destination}</td>
                                <td>${d.scheduledDeparture}</td>
                                <td>${d.track}</td>
                                <td class="${d.delay > 0 ? 'delayed' : ''}">${d.status} ${d.delay > 0 ? `(+${d.delay} ${translations[currentLang]?.minutes || 'min'})` : ''}</td>
                            </tr>
                        `).join('')}
                    </tbody>
                </table>
            `;
        } catch (err) {
            document.getElementById('board').innerHTML = `<div class="error">Errore: ${err.message}</div>`;
        }
    }

    document.getElementById('loadBtn').onclick = loadDepartures;

    // Inizializza lingua
    document.getElementById('langSelect').value = currentLang;
    setLanguage(currentLang);
    document.getElementById('langSelect').addEventListener('change', e => setLanguage(e.target.value));

    // Cookie banner
    if (!localStorage.getItem('cookieChoice')) document.getElementById('cookieBanner').style.display = 'block';
    document.getElementById('acceptCookies').onclick = () => {
        localStorage.setItem('cookieChoice', 'accepted');
        document.getElementById('cookieBanner').style.display = 'none';
        alert(translations[currentLang]?.cookie_accept_msg || 'Grazie, i tuoi dati verranno usati per la ricerca del gruppo 104 in un server molto sicuro (quello di Matteo)');
    };
    document.getElementById('rejectCookies').onclick = () => {
        localStorage.setItem('cookieChoice', 'rejected');
        document.getElementById('cookieBanner').style.display = 'none';
        alert(translations[currentLang]?.cookie_reject_msg || 'ok, chill va bene lo stesso :(');
    };
</script>

<script>
    const out = document.getElementById('output');
    async function testLogin() {
        const res = await fetch('/api/login', { method: 'POST', headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json'}, body: JSON.stringify({email:'a@b.com',password:'123'}) });
        const data = await res.json();
        out.innerText = JSON.stringify(data, null, 2);
    }
    async function testSearch() {
        const res = await fetch('/api/search', { method: 'POST', headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json'}, body: JSON.stringify({from:'MI',to:'RO'}) });
        const data = await res.json();
        out.innerText = JSON.stringify(data, null, 2);
    }
    async function testPurchase() {
        const res = await fetch('/api/purchase', { method: 'POST', headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json'}, body: JSON.stringify({ticketId:999}) });
        const data = await res.json();
        out.innerText = JSON.stringify(data, null, 2);
    }

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="it">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <title data-i18n="title">Stato Treno in Tempo Reale</title>

<script>
    // ----- TRADUZIONI -----
    const translations = {
        it: {
            title: "🚆 Stato Treno in Tempo Reale", run_id_placeholder: "ID corsa (es. 201)", search_status: "Cerca stato",
            simulate_title: "Simula ritardo (solo admin)", delay_minutes: "Minuti di ritardo", apply_delay: "Applica ritardo",
            train: "Treno", status_label: "Stato", current_delay: "Ritardo attuale",
            last_update: "Ultimo aggiornamento", next_station: "Prossima stazione", arrival_expected: "arrivo previsto",
            minutes: "minuti", cookie_text: "🍪 Questo sito utilizza cookie per migliorare l'esperienza.", accept: "Accetta", reject: "Rifiuta",
            minutes_short: "min", delayed: "Ritardo", prediction: "Previsione ritardo (basata su storico)", based_on: "basata su", confidence: "confidenza"
        },
        en: {
            title: "🚆 Real-Time Train Status", run_id_placeholder: "Run ID (e.g. 201)", search_status: "Check status",
            simulate_title: "Simulate delay (admin only)", delay_minutes: "Delay minutes", apply_delay: "Apply delay",
            train: "Train", status_label: "Status", current_delay: "Current delay",
            last_update: "Last update", next_station: "Next station", arrival_expected: "expected arrival",
            minutes: "minutes", cookie_text: "🍪 This site uses cookies to improve your experience.", accept: "Accept", reject: "Reject",
            minutes_short: "min", delayed: "Delayed", prediction: "Delay prediction (based on history)", based_on: "based on", confidence: "confidence"
        },
        de: {
            title: "🚆 Echtzeit-Zugstatus", run_id_placeholder: "Lauf-ID (z.B. 201)", search_status: "Status abfragen",
            simulate_title: "Verspätung simulieren (nur Admin)", delay_minutes: "Verspätung in Minuten", apply_delay: "Verspätung anwenden",
            train: "Zug", status_label: "Status", current_delay: "Aktuelle Verspätung",
            last_update: "Letzte Aktualisierung", next_station: "Nächster Bahnhof", arrival_expected: "voraussichtliche Ankunft",
            minutes: "Minuten", cookie_text: "🍪 Diese Website verwendet Cookies, um Ihr Erlebnis zu verbessern.", accept: "Akzeptieren", reject: "Ablehnen",
            minutes_short: "Min", delayed: "Verspätet", prediction: "Verspätungsvorhersage (basierend auf Historie)", based_on: "basiert auf", confidence: "Konfidenz"
        }
    };

    let currentLang = localStorage.getItem('lang') || 'it';
    function setLanguage(lang) {
        currentLang = lang; localStorage.setItem('lang', lang);
        document.querySelectorAll('[data-i18n]').forEach(el => {
            const key = el.getAttribute('data-i18n');
            if (translations[lang] && translations[lang][key]) el.innerText = translations[lang][key];
        });
        document.querySelectorAll('[data-i18n-placeholder]').forEach(el => {
            const key = el.getAttribute('data-i18n-placeholder');
            if (translations[lang] && translations[lang][key]) el.placeholder = translations[lang][key];
        });
        const token = localStorage.getItem('token');
        if (token) {
            fetch('/api/language', { method: 'POST', headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json', 'Authorization': `Bearer ${token}` }, body: JSON.stringify({ language: lang }) }).catch(e => console.warn);
        }
    }

    document.getElementById('langSelect').value = currentLang;
    setLanguage(currentLang);
    document.getElementById('langSelect').addEventListener('change', e => setLanguage(e.target.value));

    // ----- LOGICA STATO TRENO -----
    const token = localStorage.getItem('token');
    const role = localStorage.getItem('userRole');
    if (role === 'administrator') document.getElementById('adminSection').style.display = 'block';

    async function searchAndPredict() {
        const runId = document.getElementById('runId').value;
        if (!runId) return;

        // Stato attuale
        const statusRes = await fetch(`/api/train-status/${runId}`);
        const statusData = await statusRes.json();
        const statusDiv = document.getElementById('status');
        if (statusRes.ok) {
            statusDiv.innerHTML = `
                <div class="info">
                    <strong>${translations[currentLang]?.train || 'Treno'} ${statusData.trainCode}</strong><br>
                    ${translations[currentLang]?.status_label || 'Stato'}: <span class="${statusData.status === 'delayed' ? 'delayed' : ''}">${statusData.status === 'delayed' ? translations[currentLang]?.delayed || 'Ritardo' : statusData.status}</span><br>
                    ${translations[currentLang]?.current_delay || 'Ritardo attuale'}: ${statusData.currentDelay} ${translations[currentLang]?.minutes_short || 'min'}<br>
                    ${translations[currentLang]?.last_update || 'Ultimo aggiornamento'}: ${new Date(statusData.lastUpdate).toLocaleString()}<br>
                    ${translations[currentLang]?.next_station || 'Prossima stazione'}: ${statusData.nextStation} (${translations[currentLang]?.arrival_expected || 'arrivo previsto'} ${statusData.scheduledArrival})
                </div>
            `;
        } else {
            statusDiv.innerHTML = `<div class="error">${statusData.error || 'Errore'}</div>`;
        }

        // Predizione ritardo
        const predRes = await fetch(`/api/predict-delay/${runId}`);
        const predData = await predRes.json();
        const predDiv = document.getElementById('predictionResult');
        if (predRes.ok) {
            predDiv.innerHTML = `
                <div class="info">
                    📊 ${translations[currentLang]?.prediction || 'Previsione ritardo'}: <strong>${predData.predictedDelayMinutes} ${translations[currentLang]?.minutes_short || 'min'}</strong><br>
                    (${translations[currentLang]?.based_on || 'basata su'} ${predData.basedOn}, ${translations[currentLang]?.confidence || 'confidenza'} ${Math.round(predData.confidence*100)}%)
                </div>
            `;
        } else {
            predDiv.innerHTML = `<div class="error">${predData.error}</div>`;
        }
    }

    document.getElementById('searchBtn').onclick = searchAndPredict;

    document.getElementById('simulateBtn').onclick = async () => {
        const runId = document.getElementById('runId').value;
        const delay = document.getElementById('delayMinutes').value;
        const res = await fetch('/api/simulate-delay', {
            method: 'POST',
            headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json', 'Authorization': `Bearer ${token}` },
            body: JSON.stringify({ runId: parseInt(runId), delayMinutes: parseInt(delay) })
        });
        const data = await res.json();
        alert(data.message);
        searchAndPredict();
    };

    // Cookie banner
    if (!localStorage.getItem('cookieChoice')) document.getElementById('cookieBanner').style.display = 'block';
    document.getElementById('acceptCookies').onclick = () => {
        localStorage.setItem('cookieChoice', 'accepted');
        document.getElementById('cookieBanner').style.display = 'none';
        alert(translations[currentLang]?.cookie_accept_msg || 'Grazie, i tuoi dati verranno usati per la ricerca del gruppo 104 in einem sehr sicheren Server (dem von Matteo)');
    };
    document.getElementById('rejectCookies').onclick = () => {
        localStorage.setItem('cookieChoice', 'rejected');
        document.getElementById('cookieBanner').style.display = 'none';
        alert(translations[currentLang]?.cookie_reject_msg || 'ok, chill va bene lo stesso :(');
    };
</script>
</body>
</html>

import fs from 'fs';
import path from 'path';
import { fileURLToPath } from 'url';
import crypto from 'crypto';

const __dirname = path.dirname(fileURLToPath(import.meta.url));
const DB_PATH = path.join(__dirname, '../../database/database.json');

function readDB() {
    return JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(DB_PATH, 'utf8'));
}
function writeDB(data) {
    fs.writeFileSync(DB_PATH, JSON.stringify(data, null, 2));
}
function hashPassword(pwd) {
    return crypto.createHash('sha256').update(pwd).digest('hex');
}

export class AccountController {
    /**
     * UC10 - Change password (FR29)
     * @param {Object} req - body: { oldPassword, newPassword }
     * @param {Object} res
     */
    static async changePassword(req, res) {
        const { oldPassword, newPassword } = req.body;
        const userId = req.user.userId;
        const db = readDB();
        const user = db.users.find(u => u.userId === userId);
        if (!user || user.passwordHash !== hashPassword(oldPassword)) {
            return res.status(401).json({ success: false, message: 'Password attuale errata' });
        }
        if (newPassword.length < 8) {
            return res.status(400).json({ success: false, message: 'La nuova password deve essere lunga almeno 8 caratteri' });
        }
        user.passwordHash = hashPassword(newPassword);
        writeDB(db);
        res.json({ success: true, message: 'Password modificata con successo' });
    }

    /**
     * UC10 - Delete account (FR27)
     * @param {Object} req
     * @param {Object} res
     */
    static async deleteAccount(req, res) {
        const userId = req.user.userId;
        const db = readDB();
        const userIndex = db.users.findIndex(u => u.userId === userId);
        if (userIndex === -1) return res.status(404).json({ success: false, message: 'Utente non trovato' });
        // Controlla se ci sono biglietti attivi (NFR27)
        const activeTickets = db.tickets.some(t => t.userId === userId && t.status === 'active');
        if (activeTickets) {
            return res.status(400).json({ success: false, message: 'Non puoi eliminare l\'account con biglietti attivi' });
        }
        db.users.splice(userIndex, 1);
        // Anonimizza i ticket storici (GDPR)
        db.tickets.filter(t => t.userId === userId).forEach(t => t.userId = null);
        writeDB(db);
        res.json({ success: true, message: 'Account eliminato' });
    }
}

04.06.2026  23:49             4'469 AuthController.js

import fs from 'fs';
import path from 'path';
import crypto from 'crypto';
import { fileURLToPath } from 'url';

const __dirname = path.dirname(fileURLToPath(import.meta.url));
const DB_PATH = path.join(__dirname, '../../database/database.json');

function readDB() {
    return JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(DB_PATH, 'utf8'));
}
function writeDB(data) {
    fs.writeFileSync(DB_PATH, JSON.stringify(data, null, 2));
}
function hashPassword(pwd) {
    return crypto.createHash('sha256').update(pwd).digest('hex');
}
function generateToken() {
    return crypto.randomBytes(32).toString('hex');
}

// Session store (in produzione usare Redis)
const sessions = new Map();

export class AuthController {
    /**
     * UC2 - Registrazione nuovo utente (FR12)
     * @param {Object} req - Express request
     * @param {Object} res - Express response
     */
    static async register(req, res) {
        const { name, surname, email, password } = req.body;
        const db = readDB();
        if (db.users.find(u => u.email === email)) {
            return res.status(400).json({ success: false, message: 'Email già registrata' });
        }
        if (!password || password.length < 8) {
            return res.status(400).json({ success: false, message: 'Password minima 8 caratteri' });
        }
        const newId = Math.max(...db.users.map(u => u.userId)) + 1;
        const newUser = {
            userId: newId,
            name, surname, email,
            passwordHash: hashPassword(password),
            role: 'passenger',
            preferredLanguage: 'it',
            loyaltyPoints: 0,
            failedLoginAttempts: 0,
            accountStatus: 'active'
        };
        db.users.push(newUser);
        writeDB(db);
        res.json({ success: true, message: 'Registrazione completata' });
    }

    /**
     * UC2 - Login (FR28)
     * @param {Object} req - Express request
     * @param {Object} res - Express response
     */
    static async login(req, res) {
        const { email, password } = req.body;
        const db = readDB();
        const user = db.users.find(u => u.email === email);
        if (!user || user.passwordHash !== hashPassword(password)) {
            // Extension: failed attempts (NFR20)
            if (user) {
                user.failedLoginAttempts = (user.failedLoginAttempts || 0) + 1;
                if (user.failedLoginAttempts >= 5) {
                    user.accountStatus = 'blocked';
                }
                writeDB(db);
            }
            return res.status(401).json({ success: false, message: 'Credenziali errate' });
        }
        if (user.accountStatus !== 'active') {
            return res.status(401).json({ success: false, message: 'Account bloccato' });
        }
        // Reset tentativi falliti
        user.failedLoginAttempts = 0;
        writeDB(db);

        const token = generateToken();
        sessions.set(token, { userId: user.userId, role: user.role });
        res.json({
            success: true,
            token,
            user: { id: user.userId, name: user.name, role: user.role }
        });
    }

    /**
     * UC2 - Logout (FR34)
     * @param {Object} req - Express request
     * @param {Object} res - Express response
     */
    static async logout(req, res) {
        const auth = req.headers.authorization;
        if (auth && auth.startsWith('Bearer ')) {
            const token = auth.slice(7);
            sessions.delete(token);
        }
        res.json({ success: true });
    }

    /**
     * Validazione token (middleware)
     */
    static authenticate(req, res, next) {
        const auth = req.headers.authorization;
        if (!auth || !auth.startsWith('Bearer ')) {
            return res.status(401).json({ error: 'Unauthorized' });
        }
        const token = auth.slice(7);
        const session = sessions.get(token);
        if (!session) {
            return res.status(401).json({ error: 'Invalid token' });
        }
        req.user = session;
        next();
    }

    /**
     * Middleware per controllo ruolo
     */
    static requireRole(role) {
        return (req, res, next) => {
            if (req.user.role !== role) {
                return res.status(403).json({ error: `Forbidden: ${role} role required` });
            }
            next();
        };
    }
}

import fs from 'fs';
import path from 'path';
import { fileURLToPath } from 'url';

const __dirname = path.dirname(fileURLToPath(import.meta.url));
const DB_PATH = path.join(__dirname, '../../database/database.json');

function readDB() { return JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(DB_PATH, 'utf8')); }
function writeDB(data) { fs.writeFileSync(DB_PATH, JSON.stringify(data, null, 2)); }

export class NotificationController {
    /**
     * UC7 - Crea notifiche per tutti i passeggeri con biglietto attivo sul treno in ritardo.
     * @param {number} runId
     * @param {number} delayMinutes
     */
    static async notifyDelay(runId, delayMinutes) {
        const db = readDB();
        const affectedTickets = db.tickets.filter(t => t.runId === runId && t.status === 'active');
        const userIds = [...new Set(affectedTickets.map(t => t.userId))];
        const now = new Date().toISOString();
        for (const userId of userIds) {
            const newId = Math.max(...db.notifications.map(n => n.notificationId)) + 1;
            db.notifications.push({
                notificationId: newId,
                userId,
                message: `Il treno della corsa ${runId} ha un ritardo di ${delayMinutes} minuti.`,
                type: 'delay_alert',
                date: now,
                read: false
            });
        }
        writeDB(db);
        // In un'app reale qui si invierebbe anche email (NFR23)
    }

    /**
     * UC7 - Recupera le notifiche dell'utente autenticato.
     * @param {Object} req
     * @param {Object} res
     */
    static async getUserNotifications(req, res) {
        const userId = req.user.userId;
        const db = readDB();
        const userNotifs = db.notifications.filter(n => n.userId === userId);
        res.json({ notifications: userNotifs });
    }
}

import fs from 'fs';

export class ScheduleController {
    /**
     * UC13 - Shift schedule display (FR25) per ticket inspector
     * @param {Object} req - params: inspectorId
     * @param {Object} res
     */
    static async getSchedule(req, res) {
        const inspectorId = parseInt(req.params.inspectorId);
        if (req.user.userId !== inspectorId && req.user.role !== 'administrator') {
            return res.status(403).json({ error: 'Accesso negato' });
        }
        const db = readDB();
        const shifts = db.shiftSchedules.filter(s => s.staffId === inspectorId);
        const enriched = shifts.map(s => {
            const run = db.trainRuns.find(r => r.runId === s.trainRunId);
            const route = db.routes.find(r => r.routeId === run?.routeId);
            const train = db.trains.find(t => t.trainId === run?.trainId);
            return {
                date: s.date,
                startTime: s.startTime,
                endTime: s.endTime,
                route: s.assignedRoute,
                trainCode: train?.trainCode,
                trainType: train?.trainType
            };
        });
        res.json({ shifts: enriched });
    }
}

import fs from 'fs';
import path from 'path';
import { fileURLToPath } from 'url';

const __dirname = path.dirname(fileURLToPath(import.meta.url));
const DB_PATH = path.join(__dirname, '../../database/database.json');

function readDB() {
    return JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(DB_PATH, 'utf8'));
}

export class StatisticsController {
    /**
     * UC14 - View statistics (FR32) – for administrators
     * @param {Object} req
     * @param {Object} res
     */
    static async getStatistics(req, res) {
        const db = readDB();
        const totalRevenue = db.payments.reduce((sum, p) => sum + p.amount, 0);
        const totalBookings = db.tickets.length;
        const delayedRuns = db.trainRuns.filter(r => r.status === 'delayed').length;
        const activeUsers = db.users.filter(u => u.accountStatus === 'active' && u.role === 'passenger').length;

        // Dettaglio per route (frequenza)
        const routeStats = {};
        for (const ticket of db.tickets) {
            const run = db.trainRuns.find(r => r.runId === ticket.runId);
            if (run) {
                const route = db.routes.find(r => r.routeId === run.routeId);
                if (route) {
                    routeStats[route.routeName] = (routeStats[route.routeName] || 0) + 1;
                }
            }
        }

        res.json({
            revenue: totalRevenue,
            bookings: totalBookings,
            delayedTrains: delayedRuns,
            activeUsers,
            routeBreakdown: routeStats
        });
    }
}

import fs from 'fs';
import path from 'path';
import { fileURLToPath } from 'url';
import { AuthController } from './AuthController.js';

const __dirname = path.dirname(fileURLToPath(import.meta.url));
const DB_PATH = path.join(__dirname, '../../database/database.json');

function readDB() {
    return JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(DB_PATH, 'utf8'));
}
function writeDB(data) {
    fs.writeFileSync(DB_PATH, JSON.stringify(data, null, 2));
}

export class TicketPurchaseController {
    /**
     * UC4 - Purchase ticket or subscription (FR13, FR14, FR8, FR9, FR10, FR21)
     * @param {Object} req - body: { runId, fromStopOrder, toStopOrder, passengerType, travelClass, seatNumber, extras, totalPrice }
     * @param {Object} res
     */
    static async purchase(req, res) {
        const userId = req.user.userId;
        const { runId, fromStopOrder, toStopOrder, passengerType, travelClass, seatNumber, extras, totalPrice } = req.body;
        const db = readDB();

        const user = db.users.find(u => u.userId === userId);
        if (!user) return res.status(400).json({ success: false, message: 'Utente non valido' });

        // Verifica disponibilità (FR8 seat selection)
        const existingReservation = db.seatReservations.find(sr => sr.runId === runId && sr.seatNumber === seatNumber);
        if (existingReservation && existingReservation.status !== 'free') {
            return res.status(409).json({ success: false, message: 'Posto già occupato o prenotato' });
        }

        const newTicketId = Math.max(...db.tickets.map(t => t.ticketId)) + 1;
        const now = new Date().toISOString();
        const newTicket = {
            ticketId: newTicketId,
            ticketCode: `TKT-${userId}-${newTicketId}`,
            userId,
            runId,
            fromStopOrder,
            toStopOrder,
            passengerType,
            seatNumber,
            class: travelClass,
            price: totalPrice,
            status: 'active',
            purchaseDate: now,
            qrCode: `QR${newTicketId}${Math.random().toString(36).substring(2,8)}`
        };
        db.tickets.push(newTicket);

        // Punti fedeltà (FR19)
        const pointsEarned = Math.floor(totalPrice);
        user.loyaltyPoints += pointsEarned;
        const newLoyaltyId = Math.max(...db.loyaltyTransactions.map(l => l.transactionId)) + 1;
        db.loyaltyTransactions.push({
            transactionId: newLoyaltyId,
            userId,
            points: pointsEarned,
            reason: `Acquisto biglietto #${newTicketId}`,
            date: now
        });

        // Pagamento (NFR19)
        const newPaymentId = Math.max(...db.payments.map(p => p.paymentId)) + 1;
        db.payments.push({
            paymentId: newPaymentId,
            userId,
            ticketId: newTicketId,
            subscriptionId: null,
            amount: totalPrice,
            paymentDate: now,
            paymentMethod: 'Credit Card',
            transactionId: `TXN${newPaymentId}`,
            status: 'completed'
        });

        // Prenotazione posto
        if (existingReservation) {
            existingReservation.status = 'reserved';
            existingReservation.ticketId = newTicketId;
        } else {
            db.seatReservations.push({
                runId,
                coachNumber: 1,
                seatNumber,
                ticketId: newTicketId,
                status: 'reserved'
            });
        }

        // Servizi extra (FR9, FR10)
        if (extras && extras.length) {
            for (const extra of extras) {
                const newResId = Math.max(...db.additionalReservations.map(r => r.reservationId)) + 1;
                db.additionalReservations.push({
                    reservationId: newResId,
                    ticketId: newTicketId,
                    type: extra.type,
                    status: 'confirmed',
                    price: extra.price
                });
            }
        }

        writeDB(db);
        res.json({ success: true, ticketId: newTicketId });
    }

    /**
     * UC9 - Modify ticket (FR16)
     * @param {Object} req - body: { ticketId, newDate, newTime }
     * @param {Object} res
     */
    static async modifyTicket(req, res) {
        const { ticketId, newDate, newTime } = req.body;
        const db = readDB();
        const ticket = db.tickets.find(t => t.ticketId === ticketId);
        if (!ticket) return res.status(404).json({ success: false, message: 'Biglietto non trovato' });
        if (ticket.userId !== req.user.userId && req.user.role !== 'administrator') {
            return res.status(403).json({ success: false, message: 'Non autorizzato' });
        }

        const run = db.trainRuns.find(r => r.runId === ticket.runId);
        const originalDeparture = new Date(run.departureDateTime);
        const now = new Date();
        const hoursDiff = (originalDeparture - now) / (1000 * 3600);

        // Regola: se >24h si può cambiare data e ora, altrimenti solo ora (FR16)
        if (hoursDiff <= 24 && newDate !== originalDeparture.toISOString().slice(0,10)) {
            return res.status(400).json({ success: false, message: 'Modifica data non consentita a meno di 24 ore dalla partenza' });
        }

        // Aggiorna il runId (cerca un nuovo run con la stessa route e la nuova data)
        const route = db.routes.find(r => r.routeId === run.routeId);
        const newRun = db.trainRuns.find(r => r.routeId === route.routeId && r.departureDateTime.startsWith(newDate));
        if (!newRun) return res.status(404).json({ success: false, message: 'Nessun treno disponibile nella nuova data' });

        ticket.runId = newRun.runId;
        writeDB(db);
        res.json({ success: true, message: 'Biglietto modificato con successo' });
    }
}

import fs from 'fs';
import path from 'path';
import { fileURLToPath } from 'url';

const __dirname = path.dirname(fileURLToPath(import.meta.url));
const DB_PATH = path.join(__dirname, '../../database/database.json');

function readDB() {
    return JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(DB_PATH, 'utf8'));
}

function calculatePrice(fromStation, toStation, travelClass) {
    const R = 6371;
    const dLat = (toStation.latitude - fromStation.latitude) * Math.PI / 180;
    const dLon = (toStation.longitude - fromStation.longitude) * Math.PI / 180;
    const a = Math.sin(dLat/2)**2 + Math.cos(fromStation.latitude * Math.PI/180) * Math.cos(toStation.latitude * Math.PI/180) * Math.sin(dLon/2)**2;
    const c = 2 * Math.atan2(Math.sqrt(a), Math.sqrt(1-a));
    const km = R * c;
    let price = km * 0.15;
    if (travelClass === 'business') price *= 1.8;
    return Math.round(price * 100) / 100;
}

export class TrainSearchController {
    /**
     * UC1 - Search Train (FR1, FR3, FR4, FR5, FR11)
     * @param {Object} req - body: { departureStationName, arrivalStationName, date, travelClass }
     * @param {Object} res
     */
    static async search(req, res) {
        const { departureStationName, arrivalStationName, date, travelClass } = req.body;
        const db = readDB();

        const fromStation = db.stations.find(s => s.name.toLowerCase() === departureStationName.toLowerCase());
        const toStation = db.stations.find(s => s.name.toLowerCase() === arrivalStationName.toLowerCase());
        if (!fromStation || !toStation) {
            return res.json({ trains: [] });
        }

        const searchDate = new Date(date);
        const results = [];

        for (const run of db.trainRuns) {
            const route = db.routes.find(r => r.routeId === run.routeId);
            if (!route) continue;
            const fromStop = route.stops.find(stop => stop.stationId === fromStation.stationId);
            const toStop = route.stops.find(stop => stop.stationId === toStation.stationId);
            if (!fromStop || !toStop || fromStop.stopOrder >= toStop.stopOrder) continue;

            const runDate = new Date(run.departureDateTime);
            if (runDate.toDateString() !== searchDate.toDateString()) continue;
            if (run.status === 'cancelled') continue;

            const train = db.trains.find(t => t.trainId === run.trainId);
            if (!train.serviceClasses.includes(travelClass)) continue;

            const depTime = new Date(runDate);
            const [depHour, depMin] = fromStop.scheduledDeparture.split(':');
            depTime.setHours(parseInt(depHour), parseInt(depMin), 0);

            const arrTime = new Date(runDate);
            const [arrHour, arrMin] = toStop.scheduledArrival.split(':');
            arrTime.setHours(parseInt(arrHour), parseInt(arrMin), 0);
            if (arrTime < depTime) arrTime.setDate(arrTime.getDate() + 1);

            const durationMs = arrTime - depTime;
            const durationMinutes = Math.round(durationMs / 60000);
            const price = calculatePrice(fromStation, toStation, travelClass);

            results.push({
                id: run.runId,
                from: fromStation.name,
                to: toStation.name,
                departureTime: depTime.toISOString(),
                arrivalTime: arrTime.toISOString(),
                duration: `${Math.floor(durationMinutes/60)}h ${durationMinutes%60}m`,
                price,
                trainType: train.trainType,
                trainCode: train.trainCode,
                travelClass
            });
        }
        res.json({ trains: results });
    }

    /**
     * UC5 - Check Train Status (FR15, FR33)
     * @param {Object} req - params: trainId (runId)
     * @param {Object} res
     */
    static async trainStatus(req, res) {
        const runId = parseInt(req.params.runId);
        const db = readDB();
        const run = db.trainRuns.find(r => r.runId === runId);
        if (!run) return res.status(404).json({ error: 'Train run not found' });

        const route = db.routes.find(r => r.routeId === run.routeId);
        const train = db.trains.find(t => t.trainId === run.trainId);
        const stops = route.stops.map(stop => {
            const station = db.stations.find(s => s.stationId === stop.stationId);
            return {
                stationName: station.name,
                scheduledArrival: stop.scheduledArrival,
                scheduledDeparture: stop.scheduledDeparture,
                track: stop.trackNumber
            };
        });

        res.json({
            runId: run.runId,
            trainCode: train.trainCode,
            status: run.status,
            currentDelayMinutes: run.currentDelayMinutes,
            stops,
            realTimePosition: run.actualDeparture ? 'In viaggio' : 'Non partito'
        });
    }

    /**
     * UC6 - Boards Visualization (FR6) – partenze/arrivi di una stazione
     * @param {Object} req - query: stationName, boardType (departures/arrivals)
     * @param {Object} res
     */
    static async stationBoard(req, res) {
        const { stationName, boardType } = req.query;
        const db = readDB();
        const station = db.stations.find(s => s.name.toLowerCase() === stationName.toLowerCase());
        if (!station) return res.status(404).json({ error: 'Station not found' });

        const today = new Date().toISOString().slice(0,10);
        const results = [];

        for (const run of db.trainRuns) {
            const runDate = new Date(run.departureDateTime).toISOString().slice(0,10);
            if (runDate !== today) continue;

            const route = db.routes.find(r => r.routeId === run.routeId);
            const stop = route.stops.find(s => s.stationId === station.stationId);
            if (!stop) continue;

            const train = db.trains.find(t => t.trainId === run.trainId);
            if (boardType === 'departures' && stop.scheduledDeparture) {
                results.push({
                    trainCode: train.trainCode,
                    destination: route.stops[route.stops.length-1].stationName,
                    scheduledTime: stop.scheduledDeparture,
                    track: stop.trackNumber,
                    status: run.status
                });
            } else if (boardType === 'arrivals' && stop.scheduledArrival) {
                results.push({
                    trainCode: train.trainCode,
                    origin: route.stops[0].stationName,
                    scheduledTime: stop.scheduledArrival,
                    track: stop.trackNumber,
                    status: run.status
                });
            }
        }
        res.json({ station: station.name, boardType, entries: results });
    }
}

import fs from 'fs';
import path from 'path';
import { fileURLToPath } from 'url';

const __dirname = path.dirname(fileURLToPath(import.meta.url));
const DB_PATH = path.join(__dirname, '../../database/database.json');

function readDB() {
    return JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(DB_PATH, 'utf8'));
}
function writeDB(data) {
    fs.writeFileSync(DB_PATH, JSON.stringify(data, null, 2));
}

export class ValidationController {
    /**
     * UC12 - Validate ticket (FR24) and update occupancy (FR26)
     * @param {Object} req - body: { ticketId }
     * @param {Object} res
     */
    static async validateTicket(req, res) {
        const { ticketId } = req.body;
        const db = readDB();
        const ticket = db.tickets.find(t => t.ticketId === ticketId);
        if (!ticket) {
            return res.json({ valid: false, message: 'Biglietto non trovato' });
        }
        if (ticket.status !== 'active') {
            return res.json({ valid: false, message: 'Biglietto già utilizzato o scaduto' });
        }

        // Marca come usato
        ticket.status = 'used';
        const seatRes = db.seatReservations.find(sr => sr.ticketId === ticketId);
        if (seatRes) seatRes.status = 'occupied';

        // Aggiorna occupazione (FR26) – incrementa il contatore dei posti occupati del coach
        const run = db.trainRuns.find(r => r.runId === ticket.runId);
        const coachNumber = seatRes ? seatRes.coachNumber : 1;
        const occupancy = db.occupancySnapshots.find(o => o.runId === ticket.runId && o.coachNumber === coachNumber);
        if (occupancy) {
            occupancy.occupiedSeats += 1;
            occupancy.lastUpdateBy = req.user.userId;
            occupancy.timestamp = new Date().toISOString();
        } else {
            db.occupancySnapshots.push({
                runId: ticket.runId,
                coachNumber,
                timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),
                occupiedSeats: 1,
                lastUpdateBy: req.user.userId
            });
        }
        writeDB(db);
        res.json({ valid: true, message: 'Biglietto valido e marcato come utilizzato' });
    }

    /**
     * UC12 - Track occupancy manually (FR26)
     * @param {Object} req - body: { runId, coachNumber, occupiedSeats }
     * @param {Object} res
     */
    static async updateOccupancy(req, res) {
        const { runId, coachNumber, occupiedSeats } = req.body;
        const db = readDB();
        const occupancy = db.occupancySnapshots.find(o => o.runId === runId && o.coachNumber === coachNumber);
        if (occupancy) {
            occupancy.occupiedSeats = occupiedSeats;
            occupancy.timestamp = new Date().toISOString();
            occupancy.lastUpdateBy = req.user.userId;
        } else {
            db.occupancySnapshots.push({
                runId, coachNumber,
                timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),
                occupiedSeats,
                lastUpdateBy: req.user.userId
            });
        }
        writeDB(db);
        res.json({ success: true });
    }
}

function setLanguage(lang) {
    localStorage.setItem('lang', lang);
    document.querySelectorAll('[data-i18n]').forEach(el => {
        const key = el.getAttribute('data-i18n');
        if (translations[lang] && translations[lang][key]) el.innerText = translations[lang][key];
    });
}
const savedLang = localStorage.getItem('lang') || 'it';
document.getElementById('langSelect').value = savedLang;
setLanguage(savedLang);
document.getElementById('langSelect').addEventListener('change', (e) => setLanguage(e.target.value));

/**
 * @class PaymentTransaction
 * @description Transazione di pagamento.
 */
export class PaymentTransaction {
    constructor(paymentId, amount, paymentDate, paymentStatus) {
        this.paymentId = paymentId;
        this.amount = amount;
        this.paymentDate = paymentDate;
        this.paymentStatus = paymentStatus; // PENDING, COMPLETED, FAILED, REFUNDED
    }

    /**
     * UC4 - Autorizza il pagamento (chiamata a gateway esterno).
     * @param {number} amount
     * @returns {boolean}
     */
    authorize(amount) {
        // Simula autorizzazione
        if (amount > 0) {
            this.paymentStatus = 'COMPLETED';
            return true;
        }
        this.paymentStatus = 'FAILED';
        return false;
    }

    /**
     * UC11 - Esegue un rimborso.
     * @param {number} amount
     */
    refund(amount) {
        if (this.paymentStatus === 'COMPLETED') {
            this.paymentStatus = 'REFUNDED';
            console.log(`[PaymentTransaction] Rimborsati ${amount} euro`);
        }
    }
}

/**
 * @class PredictionSystem
 * @description Sistema di predizione dei ritardi.
 */
export class PredictionSystem {
    /**
     * UC1 - Restituisce predizioni per più treni.
     * @param {string} trainIds - Lista ID separati da virgola.
     * @returns {Object}
     */
    getDelayPrediction(trainIds) {
        // Simula calcolo
        return { predictions: trainIds.split(',').map(id => ({ trainId: id, delay: Math.floor(Math.random() * 15) })) };
    }

    /**
     * UC5 - Stima ritardo per un singolo treno.
     * @param {number} trainId
     * @returns {number}
     */
    getDelayEstimate(trainId) {
        return Math.floor(Math.random() * 20);
    }
}

 Volume Serial Number is 0844-3CEC
04.06.2026  23:52             3'401 RegisteredUser.js
               1 File(s)          3'401 bytes
               0 Dir(s)  111'500'673'024 bytes free
import { User } from './User.js';
import crypto from 'crypto';

/**
 * @class RegisteredUser
 * @extends User
 * @description Utente registrato al sistema.
 */
export class RegisteredUser extends User {
    /**
     * @param {number} userId
     * @param {string} name
     * @param {string} surname
     * @param {string} email
     * @param {string} preferredLanguage
     * @param {string} passwordHash - Hash SHA256 della password.
     * @param {string} accountStatus - 'active', 'blocked', 'deleted'
     * @param {number} failedLoginAttempts - Tentativi di login falliti.
     */
    constructor(userId, name, surname, email, preferredLanguage, passwordHash, accountStatus, failedLoginAttempts = 0) {
        super(userId, name, surname, email, preferredLanguage);
        this.passwordHash = passwordHash;
        this.accountStatus = accountStatus;
        this.failedLoginAttempts = failedLoginAttempts;
    }

    /**
     * UC2 - Esegue il login dell'utente.
     * @param {string} email
     * @param {string} password
     * @param {Function} hashFunction - Funzione per hashare la password (dipende dal contesto).
     * @returns {boolean} true se login riuscito.
     */
    login(email, password, hashFunction) {
        if (this.email !== email) return false;
        if (this.accountStatus !== 'active') return false;
        if (this.passwordHash !== hashFunction(password)) {
            this.failedLoginAttempts++;
            return false;
        }
        this.failedLoginAttempts = 0;
        return true;
    }

    /** UC2 - Logout (solitamente lato client, qui solo log) */
    logout() {
        console.log(`[RegisteredUser] ${this.email} logged out`);
    }

    /**
     * UC10 - Cambia password.
     * @param {string} oldPass
     * @param {string} newPass
     * @param {Function} hashFunction
     * @returns {boolean}
     */
    changePassword(oldPass, newPass, hashFunction) {
        if (this.passwordHash !== hashFunction(oldPass)) return false;
        if (newPass.length < 8) return false;
        this.passwordHash = hashFunction(newPass);
        return true;
    }

    /**
     * UC10 - Richiede recupero password (contatta il supporto).
     * @param {string} email
     * @param {Function} sendResetLinkCallback - Callback per inviare link di reset.
     */
    requestPasswordRecovery(email, sendResetLinkCallback) {
        if (this.email === email) {
            sendResetLinkCallback(this.email);
        }
    }

    /**
     * UC10 - Elimina l'account (soft delete o hard delete).
     * @param {boolean} hardDelete - Se true, rimuove completamente; altrimenti segna come 'deleted'.
     */
    eliminateAccount(hardDelete = false) {
        if (hardDelete) {
            // In un contesto reale, cancellazione fisica dal DB
            console.log(`[RegisteredUser] Account ${this.userId} hard deleted`);
        } else {
            this.accountStatus = 'deleted';
            console.log(`[RegisteredUser] Account ${this.userId} marked as deleted`);
        }
    }

    /**
     * UC8/UC9 - Visualizza i documenti di viaggio attivi.
     * @param {Array} tickets - Lista di ticket dell'utente.
     * @returns {Array} Biglietti attivi.
     */
    viewActiveDocuments(tickets) {
        return tickets.filter(t => t.status === 'active');
    }
}

               1 File(s)          1'180 bytes
               0 Dir(s)  111'500'619'776 bytes free
/**
 * @class Route
 * @description Percorso di una linea ferroviaria.
 */
export class Route {
    constructor(routeId, routeName, stops) {
        this.routeId = routeId;
        this.routeName = routeName;
        this.stops = stops; // array di oggetti Stop
    }

    /**
     * UC1 - Calcola la durata totale del percorso.
     * @returns {number} Minuti totali.
     */
    calculateDuration() {
        if (!this.stops || this.stops.length < 2) return 0;
        const firstStop = this.stops[0];
        const lastStop = this.stops[this.stops.length - 1];
        // Supponiamo che scheduledDeparture e scheduledArrival siano stringhe HH:MM
        const start = firstStop.scheduledDeparture ? firstStop.scheduledDeparture : firstStop.scheduledArrival;
        const end = lastStop.scheduledArrival ? lastStop.scheduledArrival : lastStop.scheduledDeparture;
        if (!start || !end) return 0;
        const [sh, sm] = start.split(':');
        const [eh, em] = end.split(':');
        let total = (parseInt(eh) * 60 + parseInt(em)) - (parseInt(sh) * 60 + parseInt(sm));
        if (total < 0) total += 24 * 60;
        return total;
    }
}

        this.seatNumber = seatNumber;
        this.seatStatus = seatStatus; // FREE, RESERVED, OCCUPIED
    }

    /** UC4 - Prenota il posto. */
    reserve() {
        if (this.seatStatus === 'FREE') {
            this.seatStatus = 'RESERVED';
            return true;
        }
        return false;
    }

    /** UC12 - Marca come occupato (dopo validazione). */
    markOccupied() {
        this.seatStatus = 'OCCUPIED';
    }
}

import { TravelDocument } from './TravelDocument.js';

/**
 * @class Subscription
 * @extends TravelDocument
 * @description Abbonamento per tratte ripetute.
 */
export class Subscription extends TravelDocument {
    constructor(documentId, issueDate, price, status, qrCode, subscriptionId, startDate, endDate, durationDays) {
        super(documentId, issueDate, price, status, qrCode);
        this.subscriptionId = subscriptionId;
        this.startDate = startDate;
        this.endDate = endDate;
        this.durationDays = durationDays;
    }

    /**
     * UC4 - Rinnova l'abbonamento per una data durata.
     * @param {number} durationDays
     */
    renew(durationDays) {
        this.durationDays = durationDays;
        const today = new Date();
        this.startDate = today;
        this.endDate = new Date(today);
        this.endDate.setDate(today.getDate() + durationDays);
        this.status = 'active';
        console.log(`[Subscription] Abbonamento ${this.subscriptionId} rinnovato fino al ${this.endDate}`);
    }
}

import { TravelDocument } from './TravelDocument.js';

/**
 * @class Ticket
 * @extends TravelDocument
 * @description Biglietto singolo per un viaggio.
 */
export class Ticket extends TravelDocument {
    /**
     * @param {number} documentId
     * @param {Date} issueDate
     * @param {number} price
     * @param {string} status
     * @param {string} qrCode
     * @param {number} ticketId
     * @param {Date} departureTime
     * @param {Date} arrivalTime
     * @param {string} passengerType - 'adult' | 'child'
     */
    constructor(documentId, issueDate, price, status, qrCode, ticketId, departureTime, arrivalTime, passengerType) {
        super(documentId, issueDate, price, status, qrCode);
        this.ticketId = ticketId;
        this.departureTime = departureTime;
        this.arrivalTime = arrivalTime;
        this.passengerType = passengerType;
    }

    /**
     * UC9 - Calcola il tempo rimasto alla partenza.
     * @param {Date} currentTime
     * @returns {number} Millisecondi rimasti.
     */
    calculateTimeRemaining(currentTime) {
        const diff = this.departureTime - currentTime;
        return diff > 0 ? diff : 0;
    }

    /**
     * UC9 - Controlla se si può modificare data e ora (>24h).
     * @param {Date} currentTime
     * @returns {boolean}
     */
    allowFullModification(currentTime) {
        const hoursRemaining = this.calculateTimeRemaining(currentTime) / (1000 * 3600);
        return hoursRemaining > 24;
    }

    /**
     * UC9 - Restringe la modifica al solo orario (<24h).
     * @param {Date} currentTime
     * @returns {boolean}
     */
    restrictToTimeOnly(currentTime) {
        const hoursRemaining = this.calculateTimeRemaining(currentTime) / (1000 * 3600);
        return hoursRemaining > 0 && hoursRemaining <= 24;
    }

    /**
     * UC9 - Aggiorna il biglietto con nuovi dettagli.
     * @param {Object} newDetails - { newDate, newTime, newRunId }
     */
    updateTicket(newDetails) {
        if (newDetails.newDate) {
            const [year, month, day] = newDetails.newDate.split('-');
            this.departureTime.setFullYear(parseInt(year), parseInt(month)-1, parseInt(day));
        }
        if (newDetails.newTime) {
            const [hour, minute] = newDetails.newTime.split(':');
            this.departureTime.setHours(hour, minute, 0);
        }
        console.log(`[Ticket] Biglietto ${this.ticketId} aggiornato: nuova partenza ${this.departureTime}`);
    }
}

/**
 * @file Modello astratto per documenti di viaggio (biglietto/abbonamento).
 */

/**
 * @class TravelDocument
 * @abstract
 */
export class TravelDocument {
    /**
     * @param {number} documentId
     * @param {Date} issueDate
     * @param {number} price
     * @param {string} status - 'active', 'used', 'expired', 'cancelled'
     * @param {string} qrCode
     */
    constructor(documentId, issueDate, price, status, qrCode) {
        this.documentId = documentId;
        this.issueDate = issueDate;
        this.price = price;
        this.status = status;
        this.qrCode = qrCode;
    }

    /**
     * UC12 - Valida il documento (marcato come utilizzato).
     */
    validate() {
        if (this.status === 'active') {
            this.status = 'used';
            console.log(`[TravelDocument] Documento ${this.documentId} validato`);
            return true;
        }
        console.log(`[TravelDocument] Documento ${this.documentId} non valido (status=${this.status})`);
        return false;
    }

    /**
     * UC9/UC12 - Verifica se il documento è attivo alla data corrente.
     * @param {Date} currentDate
     * @returns {boolean}
     */
    isActive(currentDate) {
        return this.status === 'active';
    }
}

 Volume Serial Number is 0844-3CEC
05.06.2026  00:00               864 Location.js
               1 File(s)            864 bytes
               0 Dir(s)  111'510'200'320 bytes free
/**
 * @class Location
 * @description Coordinate geografiche (latitudine, longitudine).
 */
export class Location {
    /**
     * @param {number} lat - Latitudine.
     * @param {number} lon - Longitudine.
     */
    constructor(lat, lon) {
        this.lat = lat;
        this.lon = lon;
    }

    /**
     * Calcola la distanza approssimativa in km da un'altra posizione.
     * @param {Location} other
     * @returns {number}
     */
    distanceTo(other) {
        const R = 6371;
        const dLat = (other.lat - this.lat) * Math.PI / 180;
        const dLon = (other.lon - this.lon) * Math.PI / 180;
        const a = Math.sin(dLat/2)**2 + Math.cos(this.lat * Math.PI/180) * Math.cos(other.lat * Math.PI/180) * Math.sin(dLon/2)**2;
        const c = 2 * Math.atan2(Math.sqrt(a), Math.sqrt(1-a));
        return R * c;
    }
}

/**
 * @class PaymentDetails
 * @description Dettagli di pagamento forniti dal frontend.
 */
export class PaymentDetails {
    /**
     * @param {string} paymentMethod - Es. 'Visa', 'PayPal'
     * @param {string} tokenizedReference - Token temporaneo (es. da Stripe)
     */
    constructor(paymentMethod, tokenizedReference) {
        this.paymentMethod = paymentMethod;
        this.tokenizedReference = tokenizedReference;
    }

    /** @returns {boolean} true se i dati sono validi. */
    validate() {
        return !!(this.paymentMethod && this.tokenizedReference);
    }
}

import { TrainType, TravelClass } from '../enums/TrainType.js';
// Nota: gli import degli enum potrebbero essere necessari solo per i tipi, ma qui li usiamo per documentazione.

/**
 * @class SearchCriteria
 * @description Criteri di ricerca per trovare un treno.
 */
export class SearchCriteria {
    /**
     * @param {string} departureStationName
     * @param {string} arrivalStationName
     * @param {Date} date
     * @param {string} time - HH:MM (opzionale)
     * @param {string} trainType - Valore di TrainType
     * @param {string} travelClass - Valore di TravelClass
     * @param {number} passengerCount
     */
    constructor(departureStationName, arrivalStationName, date, time, trainType, travelClass, passengerCount) {
        this.departureStationName = departureStationName;
        this.arrivalStationName = arrivalStationName;
        this.date = date;
        this.time = time;
        this.trainType = trainType;
        this.travelClass = travelClass;
        this.passengerCount = passengerCount;
    }

    /** @returns {boolean} true se i criteri sono validi. */
    validate() {
        if (!this.departureStationName || !this.arrivalStationName) return false;
        if (this.departureStationName === this.arrivalStationName) return false;
        if (!this.date || isNaN(this.date.getTime())) return false;
        if (this.passengerCount < 1) return false;
        return true;
    }
}

/**
 * @class SessionToken
 * @description Token di sessione per autenticazione.
 */
export class SessionToken {
    /**
     * @param {string} tokenValue - Token casuale.
     * @param {Date} expirationTime - Data di scadenza.
     */
    constructor(tokenValue, expirationTime) {
        this.tokenValue = tokenValue;
        this.expirationTime = expirationTime;
    }

    /**
     * UC2 - Verifica se il token è scaduto.
     * @param {Date} currentTime
     * @returns {boolean}
     */
    isExpired(currentTime) {
        return currentTime > this.expirationTime;
    }
}

import { ChangeType } from '../enums/ChangeType.js';

/**
 * @class TicketChangeRequest
 * @description Richiesta di modifica di un biglietto.
 */
export class TicketChangeRequest {
    /**
     * @param {Date} newDate - Nuova data di partenza.
     * @param {string} newTime - Nuovo orario (HH:MM).
     * @param {string} changeType - Valore di ChangeType.
     */
    constructor(newDate, newTime, changeType) {
        this.newDate = newDate;
        this.newTime = newTime;
        this.changeType = changeType;
    }

    /**
     * UC9 - Valida la richiesta contro la soglia (24h).
     * @param {Date} departureTime - Orario di partenza originale.
     * @returns {boolean}
     */
    validateAgainstThreshold(departureTime) {
        const now = new Date();
        const hoursLeft = (departureTime - now) / (1000 * 3600);
        if (this.changeType === ChangeType.FULL_MODIFICATION && hoursLeft <= 24) return false;
        if (this.changeType === ChangeType.TIME_ONLY && hoursLeft > 24) return false;
        return true;
    }
}
